Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Fixed-point theorems on posets

This file aims to state and develop various fixed-point theorems on posets; in particular, the classical Tarski, Bourbaki-Witt, and Knaster–Tarski fixed-point theorems and their variants, especially constructively provable ones.

In particular, it aims to formalise some of the results of Pataraia, Dacar, Bauer, and Lumsdaine, given in https://arxiv.org/abs/1201.0340 .

Note: There is some duplication with material on posets elsewhere in the library, e.g. [Algebra.Dcpo] and [OrderTheory.OrderedSets.WellOrderedSets], which should ideally be refactored. (Indeed, there is some duplication of material also between those files.)

****************************************************************************
Note: a newer and different implementation of DCPOs and fixed point theorems
can be found in OrderTheory.DCPOs.
****************************************************************************

*)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Require Import UniMath.OrderTheory.OrderedSets.WellOrderedSets.
Require Import UniMath.OrderTheory.DCPOs.AlternativeDefinitions.Dcpo.
Require Import UniMath.OrderTheory.Posets.Subposets.

Local Open Scope poset. (* for ≤, < *)
Local Open Scope logic. (* for logic in hProp *)
Local Open Scope subtype.


(** ** Overview *)
Section Overview.
(** The following are the main results of the file (stated for now with some black boxes, for concepts not yet defined).

In [Section Check_Overview] at the end of the file, we confirm that these statements have been proven. *)

  Context (is_complete : Poset -> UU)
          (is_directed_complete : Poset -> UU)
          (is_chain_complete : Poset -> UU)
          (Progressive_map : forall P:Poset, hsubtype (P -> P))
          (Postfixedpoint : forall P:Poset, (P -> P) -> hsubtype P)
          (Fixedpoint : forall P:Poset, (P -> P) -> hsubtype P).

  Arguments Postfixedpoint {_} _.
  Arguments Fixedpoint {_} _.

  (** The master form of the Tarski/Knaster fixed-point theorems:
  the fixed points of a monotone map on a complete poset
  are themselves complete. *)
  Definition Tarski_fixpoint_theorem_statement
    := forall (P:Poset) (P_complete : is_complete P) (f : posetmorphism P P),
         is_complete (Fixedpoint f : Subposet P).

  (** A constructive fixed-point theorem, due to Pataraia. *)
  Definition fixpoint_for_monotone_on_dcpo_statement
    := forall (P : Poset) (P_dir: is_directed_complete P)
              (f : posetmorphism P P) (x : Postfixedpoint f),
         ∑ y : Fixedpoint f, pr1 x ≤ pr1 y.

  (** Classical theorem, usually attrib. Bourbaki (1949) and Witt (1951). *)
  Definition Bourbaki_Witt_fixpoint_theorem_statement
    := LEM ->
     forall (P : Poset) (_ : is_chain_complete P) (f : Progressive_map P),
       Fixedpoint (pr1 f).

End Overview.

(** ** Background material

Material not really belonging to this file.

All could (?should) eventually be upstreamed, and (in a few cases) unified with overlapping material upstream. *)
Section Auxiliary.

(** *** Partial orders *)


P: Poset
x, y: P
x ≤ y × (x != y)%type ⇒ ¬ (y ≤ x)


P: Poset
x, y: P
x ≤ y × (x != y)%type ⇒ ¬ (y ≤ x)

  
P: Poset
x, y: P
leq_xy: x ≤ y
neq_xy: (x != y)%type
leq_yx: y ≤ x
∅

  
P: Poset
x, y: P
leq_xy: x ≤ y
neq_xy: (x != y)%type
leq_yx: y ≤ x
(x = y)%type

  apply isantisymm_posetRelation; assumption.
Defined.


P: Poset
x, y: P
x = y ⇒ x ≤ y


P: Poset
x, y: P
x = y ⇒ x ≤ y

  
P: Poset
x: P
x ≤ x
 apply isrefl_posetRelation.
Defined.


(* [isaposetmorphism] is defined as in [Foundations.Sets], but (a) isn’t an hProp, and (b) lacks access function. *)

Definition isaposetmorphism_hProp {P Q : Poset} (f : P -> Q) : hProp
  := ∀ x x' : P, x ≤ x' ⇒ f x ≤ f x'.

Definition posetmorphism_property {P Q} (f : posetmorphism P Q)
  : isaposetmorphism f
:= pr2 f.


P: Poset
isaposetmorphism (idfun P)


P: Poset
isaposetmorphism (idfun P)

  intros ? ? ?; assumption.
Defined.


P, P', P'': Poset
f: P → P'
f_monot: isaposetmorphism f
g: P' → P''
g_monot: isaposetmorphism g
isaposetmorphism (g ∘ f)


P, P', P'': Poset
f: P → P'
f_monot: isaposetmorphism f
g: P' → P''
g_monot: isaposetmorphism g
isaposetmorphism (g ∘ f)

  
P, P', P'': Poset
f: P → P'
f_monot: isaposetmorphism f
g: P' → P''
g_monot: isaposetmorphism g
x, y: P
le_xy: x ≤ y
(g ∘ f) x ≤ (g ∘ f) y

  apply g_monot, f_monot, le_xy.
Defined.

(** *** HProp logic *)

(* TODO: look for naming convention for similar lemmas *)

p, q: UU
p', q': hProp
(p ⇒ p') ⇒ (q ⇒ q') ⇒ p ∨ q ⇒ p' ∨ q'


p, q: UU
p', q': hProp
(p ⇒ p') ⇒ (q ⇒ q') ⇒ p ∨ q ⇒ p' ∨ q'

  
p, q: UU
p', q': hProp
X: p ⇒ p'
X0: q ⇒ q'
p ∨ q ⇒ p' ∨ q'

  apply hconjtohdisj; split; intro;
    auto using hdisj_in1, hdisj_in2.
Defined.

(** This order of arguments is often more convenient to use than the original [hdisj_monot] *)
(* TODO: consider naming *)

p, q: UU
p', q': hProp
p ∨ q ⇒ (p ⇒ p') ⇒ (q ⇒ q') ⇒ p' ∨ q'


p, q: UU
p', q': hProp
p ∨ q ⇒ (p ⇒ p') ⇒ (q ⇒ q') ⇒ p' ∨ q'

  
p, q: UU
p', q': hProp
X: p ∨ q
X0: p ⇒ p'
X1: q ⇒ q'
p' ∨ q'
 eapply hdisj_monot; eassumption.
Defined.

(** This order of arguments is often more convenient to use than the original [hconjtohdisj] *)
(* TODO: consider naming *)

p, q: UU
r: hProp
p ∨ q ⇒ (p ⇒ r) ⇒ (q ⇒ r) ⇒ r


p, q: UU
r: hProp
p ∨ q ⇒ (p ⇒ r) ⇒ (q ⇒ r) ⇒ r

  
p, q: UU
r: hProp
X: p ∨ q
X0: p ⇒ r
X1: q ⇒ r
r
 apply (hconjtohdisj p q r); try split; assumption.
Defined.

(* TODO: look for naming convention for similar lemmas *)

p, q: UU
p ∨ q ⇒ q ∨ p


p, q: UU
p ∨ q ⇒ q ∨ p

  apply hconjtohdisj; split; intro; auto using hdisj_in1, hdisj_in2.
Defined.

(* TODO: consider naming *)

X: UU
A, B: X → UU
(∏ x : X, A x → B x) → (∃ x : X, A x) → ∃ x : X, B x


X: UU
A, B: X → UU
(∏ x : X, A x → B x) → (∃ x : X, A x) → ∃ x : X, B x

  
X: UU
A, B: X → UU
le_A_B: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
(∃ x : X, A x) → ∃ x : X, B x

  apply hinhfun, totalfun, le_A_B.
Defined.

X: UU

leq_AB: A ⊆ B
leq_BC: B ⊆ C
A ⊆ C


X: UU
A, B, C: hsubtype X
leq_AB: A ⊆ B
leq_BC: B ⊆ C
A ⊆ C

  cbn in *; auto.
Defined.

B_x: B x
∅

∃ x : X, A x ∧ B x

x: X

A x ∧ B x
 split; assumption.

H_LEM: LEM

¬ (∀ x : X, A x ⇒ B x) ⇒ (∃ x : X, A x ∧ ¬ B x)

∃ x : X, A x ∧ ¬ B x

¬ ¬ (∃ x : X, A x ∧ ¬ B x)

∅

∀ x : X, A x ⇒ B x
 
H_LEM: LEM

H_nex: ¬ (∃ x : X, A x ∧ ¬ B x)
x: X
A_x: A x
B x
 
H_LEM: LEM
X: UU
A, B: hsubtype X
H_forall: ¬ (∀ x : X, A x ⇒ B x)
H_nex: ¬ (∃ x : X, A x ∧ ¬ B x)
x: X
A_x: A x
¬ ¬ B x

  use (negexists_to_forallneg_restricted H_nex); assumption.
Defined.

Definition subtype_binaryintersection {X} (A B : hsubtype X) : hsubtype X
  := fun x => A x ∧ B x.


Setting B constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ ∩ _".
Notation "_ ∩ _" was already used in scope subtype.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

  (* precedence tighter than "⊆", also than "-" [subtype_difference].  *)
  (* in agda-input method, type \cap *)

Definition subtype_binaryintersection_leq1 {X} (A B : hsubtype X)
    : A ∩ B ⊆ A
:= fun x => pr1.

Definition subtype_binaryintersection_leq2 {X} (A B : hsubtype X)
    : A ∩ B ⊆ B
:= fun x => pr2.

(* TODO: upstream; rename to eg [binaryintersection_equiv]? *)

X: UU
A, A', B, B': hsubtype X
e_A: A ≡ A'
e_B: B ≡ B'
A ∩ B ≡ A' ∩ B'


X: UU
A, A', B, B': hsubtype X
e_A: A ≡ A'
e_B: B ≡ B'
A ∩ B ≡ A' ∩ B'

  intros x; split; intros [? ?]; split;
    try apply e_A; try apply e_B; assumption.
Defined.


X: UU
A, B, C: hsubtype X
C ⊆ A ∩ B <-> C ⊆ A ∧ C ⊆ B


X: UU
A, B, C: hsubtype X
C ⊆ A ∩ B <-> C ⊆ A ∧ C ⊆ B

A, B, C: hsubtype X
C ⊆ A ∩ B → C ⊆ A ∧ C ⊆ B
X: UU
A, B, C: hsubtype X
C ⊆ A ∧ C ⊆ B → C ⊆ A ∩ B

  
X: UU
A, B, C: hsubtype X
C ⊆ A ∩ B → C ⊆ A ∧ C ⊆ B
 
X: UU
A, B, C: hsubtype X
C_AB: C ⊆ A ∩ B
C ⊆ A ∧ C ⊆ B
 
X: UU
A, B, C: hsubtype X
C_AB: C ⊆ A ∩ B
A ∩ B ⊆ A
X: UU
A, B, C: hsubtype X
C_AB: C ⊆ A ∩ B
A ∩ B ⊆ B

    
X: UU
A, B, C: hsubtype X
C_AB: C ⊆ A ∩ B
A ∩ B ⊆ A
 apply subtype_binaryintersection_leq1.
    
X: UU
A, B, C: hsubtype X
C_AB: C ⊆ A ∩ B
A ∩ B ⊆ B
 apply subtype_binaryintersection_leq2.
  
X: UU
A, B, C: hsubtype X
C ⊆ A ∧ C ⊆ B → C ⊆ A ∩ B
 
X: UU
A, B, C: hsubtype X
(∏ x : X, C x → A x) × (∏ x : X, C x → B x)
→ ∏ x : X, C x → A x × B x
 intros [? ?]; split; auto.
Defined.

(* *** Images of functions, as hsubtypes *)

(* TODO: surely this must be in the library somewhere, along with its essential properties?? *)
Definition image {X Y : UU} (f : X -> Y) : hsubtype Y
  := fun y => ∥ hfiber f y ∥.

Definition value_in_image {X Y : UU} (f : X -> Y) (x : X) : image f (f x)
  := hinhpr (x ,, idpath _).

Definition to_image {X Y : UU} (f : X -> Y) (x : X) : image f
  := (f x,, value_in_image f x).

(** See [image_univ] below for a version that plays better with [apply]. *)

X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
A: hsubtype Y
(∀ x : X, A (f x)) <-> image f ⊆ A


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
A: hsubtype Y
(∀ x : X, A (f x)) <-> image f ⊆ A

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
A: hsubtype Y
(∀ x : X, A (f x)) → image f ⊆ A
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
A: hsubtype Y
image f ⊆ A → ∀ x : X, A (f x)

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
A: hsubtype Y
(∀ x : X, A (f x)) → image f ⊆ A
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
A: hsubtype Y
H_A: ∀ x : X, A (f x)
y: Y
Hy: image f y
A y

    
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
A: hsubtype Y
H_A: ∀ x : X, A (f x)
x: X
Hy: image f (f x)
A (f x)

    use H_A.
  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
A: hsubtype Y
image f ⊆ A → ∀ x : X, A (f x)
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
A: hsubtype Y
H_A: image f ⊆ A
x: X
A (f x)

    
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
A: hsubtype Y
H_A: image f ⊆ A
x: X
image f (f x)
 apply value_in_image.
Defined.

(** Alias of [image_univ] using explicit “forall” instead of “⊆” or “∀”, for easier use with the [apply] tactic. *)

X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
A: hsubtype Y
(∏ x : X, A (f x)) <-> (∏ y : Y, image f y → A y)


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
A: hsubtype Y
(∏ x : X, A (f x)) <-> (∏ y : Y, image f y → A y)

  apply image_univ.
Defined.

A: hsubtype Y

A: hsubtype Y
H: ∀ x : X, A (f x)
y: Y
im_y: image f y
A (pr1 (y,, im_y))
 eapply image_univ'; eassumption.

f: X → Y
A: hsubtype Y
(∀ y : image f, A (pr1 y)) → ∀ x : X, A (f x)

∏ x : X, A (f x)

∏ y : Y, image f y → A y

A y
 exact (H (y,,im_y)).
Defined.

(** Like [image_univ'], alias using explicit “forall” instead of “∀”, for easier use with the [apply] tactic. *)

X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
A: hsubtype Y
(∏ x : X, A (f x)) <-> (∏ y : image f, A (pr1 y))


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
A: hsubtype Y
(∏ x : X, A (f x)) <-> (∏ y : image f, A (pr1 y))

  apply image_carrier_univ.

Setting B constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ ∩ _".

[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

  (* precedence tighter than "⊆", also than "-" [subtype_difference].  *)
  (* in agda-input method, type \cap *)


Setting B constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ ∪ _".

  (* precedence tighter than "⊆", also than "-" [subtype_difference].  *)

(** ** Completeness properties *)

(** We use the treatment of upper bounds from [Algebra.Dcpo], but give a slightly different treatment of _least_ upper bounds,
 factoring out the general definitions of “greatest/least elements” and “upper/lower bounds”, both of a family, or satisfying some predicate. *)

Section LowerBounds.
(* NOTE: this should be kept in sync with [Section UpperBounds] below. *)

  Context {P : Poset}.

  Definition islowerbound {I} (p : I -> P) (x : P) : hProp
  := ∀ i : I, x ≤ p i.

  Definition islowerbound_subtype (A : hsubtype P) (x : P) : hProp
  := islowerbound (pr1carrier A) x.

  
P: Poset
A, B: hsubtype P
A ≡ B
→ islowerbound_subtype A ≡ islowerbound_subtype B

  
P: Poset
A, B: hsubtype P
A ≡ B
→ islowerbound_subtype A ≡ islowerbound_subtype B

    intros e_A_B x; split;
      intros x_lb [y H_y]; refine (x_lb (_,,_)); apply e_A_B; assumption.
  Defined.

  (* NOTE: For an alternative approach to [is_lower_bound_subfamily] and [image_same_lower_bounds], see analogues for upper bounds below. *)
  
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
J: Type
g: J → P
ff: ∏ j : J, image f (g j)
x: P
x_lb: islowerbound f x
islowerbound g x

  
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
J: Type
g: J → P
ff: ∏ j : J, image f (g j)
x: P
x_lb: islowerbound f x
islowerbound g x

    
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
J: Type
g: J → P
ff: ∏ j : J, image f (g j)
x: P
x_lb: islowerbound f x
j: J
x ≤ g j
 
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
J: Type
g: J → P
ff: ∏ j : J, image f (g j)
x: P
x_lb: islowerbound f x
j: J
hfiber f (g j) → x ≤ g j

    
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
J: Type
g: J → P
ff: ∏ j : J, image f (g j)
x: P
x_lb: islowerbound f x
j: J
i: I
x ≤ f i
 use x_lb.
  Defined.

  
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
x: P
islowerbound f x <-> islowerbound_subtype (image f) x

  
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
x: P
islowerbound f x <-> islowerbound_subtype (image f) x

    apply (image_carrier_univ' f (fun y => _ ≤ y)).
  Defined.

End LowerBounds.

Section UpperBounds.
(* NOTE: this should be kept in sync with [Section LowerBounds] above. *)

  (* TODO: it would be natural to just refactor [isupperbound] in [Algebra.Dcpo]
  as an hProp from the start, using [∀] and so on.  However, that turns out
  to slightly interfere with the use of [apply] on lemmas in that file, especially
  bidirectional such as [pointwiselub_islubpointwise]. Is that cosmetic cost
  worth paying?  Or can it be avoided? *)

  Context {P : Poset}.

  Definition isupperbound_hprop {I} (p : I -> P) (x:P) : hProp
  := make_hProp _ (isaprop_isupperbound p x).

  Definition isupperbound_subtype (A : hsubtype P) (x : P) : hProp
  := isupperbound_hprop (pr1carrier A) x.

  
P: Poset
A, B: hsubtype P
A ≡ B
→ isupperbound_subtype A ≡ isupperbound_subtype B

  
P: Poset
A, B: hsubtype P
A ≡ B
→ isupperbound_subtype A ≡ isupperbound_subtype B

    intros e_A_B x; split;
      intros x_ub [y H_y]; refine (x_ub (_,,_)); apply e_A_B; assumption.
  Defined.

  (* NOTE: An aternative approach alternative to comparing the upper bounds of families and their images: factor a bit.  Show that for two families, if f ≤ image g, then every upper bound of g is an upper bound for f. Thence: the non-image version.  Thence: image has same upper bounds, so same least upper bound. *)

  
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
J: Type
g: J → P
ff: ∏ j : J, image f (g j)
x: P
x_ub: isupperbound f x
isupperbound g x

  
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
J: Type
g: J → P
ff: ∏ j : J, image f (g j)
x: P
x_ub: isupperbound f x
isupperbound g x

    
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
J: Type
g: J → P
ff: ∏ j : J, image f (g j)
x: P
x_ub: isupperbound f x
j: J
g j ≤ x
 
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
J: Type
g: J → P
ff: ∏ j : J, image f (g j)
x: P
x_ub: isupperbound f x
j: J
hfiber f (g j) → g j ≤ x

    
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
J: Type
g: J → P
ff: ∏ j : J, image f (g j)
x: P
x_ub: isupperbound f x
j: J
i: I
f i ≤ x
 apply x_ub.
  Defined.

  
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
x: P
isupperbound f x <-> isupperbound_subtype (image f) x

  
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
x: P
isupperbound f x <-> isupperbound_subtype (image f) x

    apply (image_carrier_univ' f (fun y => y ≤ _)).
  Defined.

End UpperBounds.

Section Least.
(* NOTE: this should generally be kept in sync with [Section Greatest] below. *)

  Context {P : Poset}.

  Definition least_of_family {I} (p : I -> P)
  := ∑ i : I, islowerbound p (p i).

  Definition least_of_family_index {I} {p : I -> P}
    : least_of_family p -> I
  := pr1.
  (* Would be nice to make [least_of_family_index] a coercion, but can’t since its target is an arbitrary type. The best we can do instead is [realise_least_of_family]: *)
  Coercion realise_least_of_family {I} (p : I -> P)
    : least_of_family p -> P
  := fun ih => p (pr1 ih).

  Definition least_is_least {I}  (p : I -> P) (x : least_of_family p)
    : islowerbound p x
  := pr2 x.

  Definition least_suchthat (A : P -> UU) : UU
  := least_of_family (pr1 : (∑ x:P, A x) -> P).

  Identity Coercion id_least_suchthat : least_suchthat >-> least_of_family.

  Definition least_suchthat_satisfies {A : P -> UU} (x : least_suchthat A)
      : A x
  := pr2 (least_of_family_index x).

  
P: Poset
A: P → UU
x: least_suchthat A
∏ y : P, A y → x ≤ y

  
P: Poset
A: P → UU
x: least_suchthat A
∏ y : P, A y → x ≤ y

    
P: Poset
A: P → UU
x: least_suchthat A
y: P
A_y: A y
x ≤ y
 exact (least_is_least _ x (_,,A_y)).
  Defined.

  (** It’s useful to define [least_suchthat] as above, for interaction with [least_of_family], etc; but also helpful to have a standalone predicate version. *)
  (* TODO: is that really useful? could it be better to refactor [least_suchthat] as [carrier (is_least_suchthat …)]? *)
  Definition is_least_suchthat (A : P -> hProp) (x : P) : hProp
  := (A x) ∧ (islowerbound_subtype A x).

  
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: least_suchthat (λ x : P, A x)
is_least_suchthat A x

  
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: least_suchthat (λ x : P, A x)
is_least_suchthat A x

    
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: least_suchthat (λ x : P, A x)
A x
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: least_suchthat (λ x : P, A x)
islowerbound_subtype A x

    
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: least_suchthat (λ x : P, A x)
A x
 apply @least_suchthat_satisfies.
    
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: least_suchthat (λ x : P, A x)
islowerbound_subtype A x
 apply least_is_least.
  Defined.

  
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: P
x_least: is_least_suchthat A x
least_suchthat (λ x : P, A x)

  
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: P
x_least: is_least_suchthat A x
least_suchthat (λ x : P, A x)

    
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: P
x_least: is_least_suchthat A x
∑ x : P, (λ x0 : P, A x0) x
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: P
x_least: is_least_suchthat A x
(λ i : ∑ x : P, (λ x0 : P, A x0) x,
 islowerbound
   (pr1 : (∑ x : P, (λ x0 : P, A x0) x) → P)
   ((pr1 : (∑ x : P, (λ x0 : P, A x0) x) → P) i)) 
  ?pr1

    
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: P
x_least: is_least_suchthat A x
∑ x : P, (λ x0 : P, A x0) x
 
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: P
x_least: is_least_suchthat A x
A x
 apply x_least. 
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: P
x_least: is_least_suchthat A x
(λ i : ∑ x : P, (λ x0 : P, A x0) x,
 islowerbound
   (pr1 : (∑ x : P, (λ x0 : P, A x0) x) → P)
   ((pr1 : (∑ x : P, (λ x0 : P, A x0) x) → P) i))
  (x,, (let X := pr1 x_least in X))

    apply x_least.
  Defined.

End Least.

Section Greatest.
(* NOTE: this should generally be kept in sync with [Section Least] above. *)

  Context {P : Poset}.

  Definition greatest_of_family {I} (p : I -> P)
  := ∑ i : I, isupperbound p (p i).

  Definition greatest_of_family_index {I} {p : I -> P}
    : greatest_of_family p -> I
  := pr1.
  (* Would be nice to make [greatest_of_family_index] a coercion, but can’t since its target is an arbitrary type. The best we can do instead is [realise_greatest_of_family]: *)
  Coercion realise_greatest_of_family {I} (p : I -> P)
    : greatest_of_family p -> P
  := fun ih => p (pr1 ih).

  Definition greatest_is_greatest {I}  (p : I -> P) (x : greatest_of_family p)
    : isupperbound p x
  := pr2 x.

  Definition greatest_suchthat (A : P -> UU) : UU
  := greatest_of_family (pr1 : (∑ x:P, A x) -> P).

  Identity Coercion id_greatest_suchthat : greatest_suchthat >-> greatest_of_family.

  Definition greatest_suchthat_satisfies {A : P -> UU} (x : greatest_suchthat A)
      : A x
  := pr2 (greatest_of_family_index x).

  
P: Poset
A: P → UU
x: greatest_suchthat A
∏ y : P, A y → y ≤ x

  
P: Poset
A: P → UU
x: greatest_suchthat A
∏ y : P, A y → y ≤ x

    
P: Poset
A: P → UU
x: greatest_suchthat A
y: P
A_y: A y
y ≤ x
 exact (greatest_is_greatest _ x (_,,A_y)).
  Defined.

  (** It’s useful to define [greatest_suchthat] as above, for interaction with [greatest_of_family], etc; but also helpful to have a standalone predicate version. *)
  (* TODO: is that really useful? could it be better to refactor [greatest_suchthat] as [carrier (is_greatest_suchthat …)]? *)
  Definition is_greatest_suchthat (A : P -> hProp) (x : P) : hProp
  := (A x) ∧ (isupperbound_subtype A x).

  
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: greatest_suchthat (λ x : P, A x)
is_greatest_suchthat A x

  
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: greatest_suchthat (λ x : P, A x)
is_greatest_suchthat A x

    
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: greatest_suchthat (λ x : P, A x)
A x
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: greatest_suchthat (λ x : P, A x)
isupperbound_subtype A x

    
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: greatest_suchthat (λ x : P, A x)
A x
 apply @greatest_suchthat_satisfies.
    
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: greatest_suchthat (λ x : P, A x)
isupperbound_subtype A x
 apply greatest_is_greatest.
  Defined.

  
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: P
x_greatest: is_greatest_suchthat A x
greatest_suchthat (λ x : P, A x)

  
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: P
x_greatest: is_greatest_suchthat A x
greatest_suchthat (λ x : P, A x)

    
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: P
x_greatest: is_greatest_suchthat A x
∑ x : P, (λ x0 : P, A x0) x
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: P
x_greatest: is_greatest_suchthat A x
(λ i : ∑ x : P, (λ x0 : P, A x0) x,
 isupperbound
   (pr1 : (∑ x : P, (λ x0 : P, A x0) x) → P)
   ((pr1 : (∑ x : P, (λ x0 : P, A x0) x) → P) i)) 
  ?pr1

    
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: P
x_greatest: is_greatest_suchthat A x
∑ x : P, (λ x0 : P, A x0) x
 
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: P
x_greatest: is_greatest_suchthat A x
A x
 apply x_greatest. 
P: Poset
A: P → hProp
x: P
x_greatest: is_greatest_suchthat A x
(λ i : ∑ x : P, (λ x0 : P, A x0) x,
 isupperbound
   (pr1 : (∑ x : P, (λ x0 : P, A x0) x) → P)
   ((pr1 : (∑ x : P, (λ x0 : P, A x0) x) → P) i))
  (x,, (let X := pr1 x_greatest in X))

    apply x_greatest.
  Defined.

End Greatest.

Section LeastUpperBounds.

  Context {P : Poset}.

  Definition least_upper_bound {I} (p : I -> P)
  := least_suchthat (isupperbound_hprop p).
  Identity Coercion id_least_upper_bound : least_upper_bound >-> least_suchthat.

  Definition least_upper_bound_is_upper_bound {I} {p : I -> P}
             (x : least_upper_bound p)
    : isupperbound p x
  := least_suchthat_satisfies x.

  (** It’s useful to define [least_upper_bound] as above, for interaction with [upper_bound], etc; but also helpful to have a standalone predicate version. *)
  Definition is_least_upper_bound {I} (p : I -> P) (x : P) : hProp
    := is_least_suchthat (isupperbound_hprop p) x.

  Definition make_least_upper_bound {I} {p : I -> P}
      (x:P) (x_lub : is_least_upper_bound p x)
    : least_upper_bound p
  := make_least_suchthat x x_lub.

  Definition least_upper_bound_property {I} {p : I -> P}
      (x : least_upper_bound p)
    : is_least_upper_bound p x
  := least_suchthat_property x.

  (** The universal property of the least upper bound *)
  
P: Poset
I: Type
p: I → P
x: least_upper_bound p
x': P
x ≤ x' <-> isupperbound p x'

  
P: Poset
I: Type
p: I → P
x: least_upper_bound p
x': P
x ≤ x' <-> isupperbound p x'

    
P: Poset
I: Type
p: I → P
x: least_upper_bound p
x': P
x ≤ x' → isupperbound p x'
P: Poset
I: Type
p: I → P
x: least_upper_bound p
x': P
isupperbound p x' → x ≤ x'

    
P: Poset
I: Type
p: I → P
x: least_upper_bound p
x': P
x ≤ x' → isupperbound p x'
 
P: Poset
I: Type
p: I → P
x: least_upper_bound p
x': P
xx': x ≤ x'
i: I
p i ≤ x'

      
P: Poset
I: Type
p: I → P
x: least_upper_bound p
x': P
xx': x ≤ x'
i: I
p i ≤ x

      apply least_upper_bound_is_upper_bound.
    
P: Poset
I: Type
p: I → P
x: least_upper_bound p
x': P
isupperbound p x' → x ≤ x'
 
P: Poset
I: Type
p: I → P
x: least_upper_bound p
x': P
H: isupperbound p x'
x ≤ x'
 refine (least_is_least _ x (_,,H)).
  Defined.

  (** Specialisation of the above functions to least upper bounds of _subtypes_
   — a common use-case, and the functions are often easier to use in this form. *)
  Definition is_least_upper_bound_subtype (A : hsubtype P) (x : P) : hProp
    := is_least_upper_bound (pr1carrier A) x.

  Definition least_upper_bound_subtype (A : hsubtype P) : UU
    := least_upper_bound (pr1carrier A).

  Identity Coercion id_least_upper_bound_subtype
    : least_upper_bound_subtype >-> least_upper_bound.

  Definition least_upper_bound_subtype_is_upper_bound {A : hsubtype P}
      (x : least_upper_bound_subtype A) {y : P} (A_y : A y)
    : y ≤ x
  := least_upper_bound_is_upper_bound x (y,,A_y).

  
P: Poset
A: hsubtype P
x: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier A)
x': P
x ≤ x' <-> (∏ y : P, A y → y ≤ x')

  
P: Poset
A: hsubtype P
x: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier A)
x': P
x ≤ x' <-> (∏ y : P, A y → y ≤ x')

    
P: Poset
A: hsubtype P
x: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier A)
x': P
x ≤ x' → ∏ y : P, A y → y ≤ x'
P: Poset
A: hsubtype P
x: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier A)
x': P
(∏ y : P, A y → y ≤ x') → x ≤ x'

    
P: Poset
A: hsubtype P
x: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier A)
x': P
x ≤ x' → ∏ y : P, A y → y ≤ x'
 
P: Poset
A: hsubtype P
x: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier A)
x': P
H: x ≤ x'
y: P
A_y: A y
y ≤ x'

      refine (pr1 (least_upper_bound_univ x x') H (_,,_)); assumption.
    
P: Poset
A: hsubtype P
x: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier A)
x': P
(∏ y : P, A y → y ≤ x') → x ≤ x'
 
P: Poset
A: hsubtype P
x: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier A)
x': P
H: ∏ y : P, A y → y ≤ x'
x ≤ x'

      
P: Poset
A: hsubtype P
x: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier A)
x': P
H: ∏ y : P, A y → y ≤ x'
isupperbound (pr1carrier A) x'

      intros [y A_y]; apply H; assumption.
  Defined.

  (** Comparison of least upper bounds between families and their images *)

  
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
x: P
is_least_upper_bound f x <->
is_least_upper_bound (pr1carrier (image f)) x

  
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
x: P
is_least_upper_bound f x <->
is_least_upper_bound (pr1carrier (image f)) x

    
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
∏ x : P,
is_least_upper_bound f x <->
is_least_upper_bound (pr1carrier (image f)) x
 
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
isupperbound_hprop f
≡ isupperbound_hprop (pr1carrier (image f))
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
islowerbound_subtype (isupperbound_hprop f)
≡ islowerbound_subtype
    (isupperbound_hprop (pr1carrier (image f)))

    
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
isupperbound_hprop f
≡ isupperbound_hprop (pr1carrier (image f))
 use image_same_upper_bounds.
    
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
islowerbound_subtype (isupperbound_hprop f)
≡ islowerbound_subtype
    (isupperbound_hprop (pr1carrier (image f)))
 
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
isupperbound_hprop f
≡ isupperbound_hprop (pr1carrier (image f))
 use image_same_upper_bounds.
  Defined.

  (* TODO: upgrade this to an equivalence?
     easiest if done once refactoring [least_upper_bound] as
     [carrier is_least_upper_bound]. *)
  
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
least_upper_bound f <->
least_upper_bound (pr1carrier (image f))

  
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P
least_upper_bound f <->
least_upper_bound (pr1carrier (image f))

    split; intros x; apply (make_least_upper_bound x);
      apply is_least_upper_bound_image, least_upper_bound_property.
  Defined.

  (* A useful miscellaneous lemma *)
  
P: Poset
A: hsubtype P
x: P
A x
→ is_least_upper_bound_subtype A x
  → is_greatest_suchthat A x

  
P: Poset
A: hsubtype P
x: P
A x
→ is_least_upper_bound_subtype A x
  → is_greatest_suchthat A x

    
P: Poset
A: hsubtype P
x: P
A_x: A x
x_lub: is_least_upper_bound_subtype A x
is_greatest_suchthat A x
 
P: Poset
A: hsubtype P
x: P
A_x: A x
x_lub: is_least_upper_bound_subtype A x
A x
P: Poset
A: hsubtype P
x: P
A_x: A x
x_lub: is_least_upper_bound_subtype A x
isupperbound_subtype A x

    
P: Poset
A: hsubtype P
x: P
A_x: A x
x_lub: is_least_upper_bound_subtype A x
A x
 assumption.
    
P: Poset
A: hsubtype P
x: P
A_x: A x
x_lub: is_least_upper_bound_subtype A x
isupperbound_subtype A x
 apply (pr1 x_lub).
  Defined.

End LeastUpperBounds.

(* TODO: give [Section GreatestLowerBounds] dual to the above section! *)

Section Chains.

  Definition comparable {P : Poset} (x y : P) : hProp
  := (x ≤ y) ∨ (y ≤ x).

  Definition is_chain {P : Poset} {I} (p : I -> P) : hProp
  := ∀ i j : I, comparable (p i) (p j).

  Definition Chain (P : Poset) : UU
  := ∑ (I : UU), ∑ (p : I -> P), is_chain p.

  Coercion chain_index {P} (C : Chain P) : UU
  := pr1 C.

  Definition chain_family {P} (C : Chain P) : C -> P
  := pr1 (pr2 C).
  Coercion chain_family : Chain >-> Funclass.

  Definition chain_property {P} (C : Chain P) : is_chain C
  := pr2 (pr2 C).

  
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
p: I → P
is_chain p → is_chain (f ∘ p)

  
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
p: I → P
is_chain p → is_chain (f ∘ p)

    
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
p: I → P
p_chain: is_chain p
x, y: I
comparable ((f ∘ p) x) ((f ∘ p) y)

    apply (hdisj_monot' (p_chain x y));
    intro; apply posetmorphism_property; assumption.
  Defined.

  
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
Chain P → Chain Q

  
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
Chain P → Chain Q

    
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
(∑ p : I → P, is_chain p) → ∑ p : I → Q, is_chain p
 
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
(I → P) → I → Q
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
∏ x : I → P,
(λ x0 : I → P, is_chain x0) x
→ (λ x0 : I → Q, is_chain x0) (?f x)

    
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
(I → P) → I → Q
 apply (fun C => f ∘ C).
    
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
∏ x : I → P,
(λ x0 : I → P, is_chain x0) x
→ (λ x0 : I → Q, is_chain x0) ((λ C : I → P, f ∘ C) x)
 apply fmap_is_chain.
  Defined.

  Definition Chain_hsubtype (P : Poset) : UU
  := ∑ A : hsubtype P, is_chain (pr1carrier A).

  Coercion pr1_Chain_hsubtype {P} : Chain_hsubtype P -> hsubtype P
  := pr1.

  
P: Poset
Chain_hsubtype P → Chain P

  
P: Poset
Chain_hsubtype P → Chain P

    
P: Poset
C: Chain_hsubtype P
Chain P
 exact (carrier C,, (pr1carrier C,, pr2 C)).
  
New coercion path [Chain_of_Chain_hsubtype;
                   chain_family] : Chain_hsubtype >-> Funclass is ambiguous with existing 
[pr1_Chain_hsubtype; id_hsubtype] : Chain_hsubtype >-> Funclass.
[ambiguous-paths,coercions,default]


  
P: Poset
I: UU
p: I → P
is_chain p → is_chain (pr1carrier (image p))

  
P: Poset
I: UU
p: I → P
is_chain p → is_chain (pr1carrier (image p))

    
P: Poset
I: UU
p: I → P
p_chain: is_chain p
is_chain (pr1carrier (image p))
 
P: Poset
I: UU
p: I → P
p_chain: is_chain p
∀ i j : image p,
comparable (pr1carrier (image p) i)
  (pr1carrier (image p) j)

    
P: Poset
I: UU
p: I → P
p_chain: is_chain p
i: I
∀ j : image p,
comparable (p i) (pr1carrier (image p) j)

    
P: Poset
I: UU
p: I → P
p_chain: is_chain p
i, j: I
comparable (p i) (p j)

    use p_chain.
  Defined.

  
P: Poset
Chain P → Chain_hsubtype P

  
P: Poset
Chain P → Chain_hsubtype P

    
P: Poset
p: Chain P
Chain_hsubtype P
 
P: Poset
p: Chain P
is_chain (pr1carrier (image p))

    apply image_is_chain, chain_property.
  Defined.


New coercion path [Chain_of_Chain_hsubtype;
                   chain_family] : Chain_hsubtype >-> Funclass is ambiguous with existing 
[pr1_Chain_hsubtype; id_hsubtype] : Chain_hsubtype >-> Funclass.
[ambiguous-paths,coercions,default]


Section Directed.

  Definition Directed_family (P : Poset) : UU
  := ∑ (I : UU), ∑ (p : I -> P), isdirected p.

  Coercion directed_index {P} (C : Directed_family P) : UU
  := pr1 C.

  Definition directed_family {P} (C : Directed_family P) : C -> P
  := pr1 (pr2 C).
  Coercion directed_family : Directed_family >-> Funclass.

  Definition directed_property {P} (C : Directed_family P) : isdirected C
  := pr2 (pr2 C).

  (* TODO: add similar builder function for chains *)
  Definition make_directed {P:Poset} {I} {p : I -> P} (p_directed : isdirected p)
    : Directed_family P
  := (I,,(p,,p_directed)).

  
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
p: I → P
isdirected p → isdirected (f ∘ p)

  
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
p: I → P
isdirected p → isdirected (f ∘ p)

    
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
p: I → P
p_directed: isdirected p
∥ I ∥
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
p: I → P
p_directed: isdirected p
∏ i j : I,
∃ k : I, (f ∘ p) i ≤ (f ∘ p) k × (f ∘ p) j ≤ (f ∘ p) k

    
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
p: I → P
p_directed: isdirected p
∥ I ∥
 eapply isdirected_inhabited, p_directed.
    
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
p: I → P
p_directed: isdirected p
∏ i j : I,
∃ k : I, (f ∘ p) i ≤ (f ∘ p) k × (f ∘ p) j ≤ (f ∘ p) k
 
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
p: I → P
p_directed: isdirected p
i, j: I
∃ k : I, (f ∘ p) i ≤ (f ∘ p) k × (f ∘ p) j ≤ (f ∘ p) k

      
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
p: I → P
p_directed: isdirected p
i, j: I
∏ x : I,
?A x → (f ∘ p) i ≤ (f ∘ p) x × (f ∘ p) j ≤ (f ∘ p) x
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
p: I → P
p_directed: isdirected p
i, j: I
∃ x : I, ?A x

      
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
p: I → P
p_directed: isdirected p
i, j: I
∃ x : I, ?A x
 exact (isdirected_compatible p_directed i j). 
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
p: I → P
p_directed: isdirected p
i, j: I
∏ x : I,
(λ k : I, p i ≤ p k × p j ≤ p k) x
→ (f ∘ p) i ≤ (f ∘ p) x × (f ∘ p) j ≤ (f ∘ p) x

      
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
p: I → P
p_directed: isdirected p
i, j, x: I
le_i_x: p i ≤ p x
le_j_x: p j ≤ p x
(f ∘ p) i ≤ (f ∘ p) x × (f ∘ p) j ≤ (f ∘ p) x

      split; apply posetmorphism_property; assumption.
  Defined.

  
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
Directed_family P → Directed_family Q

  
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
Directed_family P → Directed_family Q

    
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
(∑ p : I → P, isdirected p)
→ ∑ p : I → Q, isdirected p
 
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
(I → P) → I → Q
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
∏ x : I → P, isdirected x → isdirected (?f x)

    
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
(I → P) → I → Q
 apply (fun C => f ∘ C).
    
P, Q: Poset
f: posetmorphism P Q
I: UU
∏ x : I → P,
isdirected x → isdirected ((λ C : I → P, f ∘ C) x)
 apply fmap_is_directed.
  Defined.

  Definition Directed_hsubtype (P : Poset) : UU
  := ∑ A : hsubtype P, isdirected (pr1carrier A).

  Coercion pr1_Directed_hsubtype {P} : Directed_hsubtype P -> hsubtype P
  := pr1.

  
P: Poset
Directed_hsubtype P → Directed_family P

  
P: Poset
Directed_hsubtype P → Directed_family P

    
P: Poset
C: Directed_hsubtype P
Directed_family P
 exact (carrier C,, (pr1carrier C,, pr2 C)).
  
New coercion path [Directed_of_Directed_hsubtype;
                   directed_family] : Directed_hsubtype >-> Funclass is ambiguous with existing 
[pr1_Directed_hsubtype; id_hsubtype] : Directed_hsubtype >-> Funclass.
[ambiguous-paths,coercions,default]


  
P: Poset
I: UU
p: I → P
isdirected p → isdirected (pr1carrier (image p))

  
P: Poset
I: UU
p: I → P
isdirected p → isdirected (pr1carrier (image p))

    
P: Poset
I: UU
p: I → P
p_directed: isdirected p
isdirected (pr1carrier (image p))

p: I → P
p_directed: isdirected p
∥ image p ∥

p: I → P

∏ i j : image p,
∃ k : image p,
pr1carrier (image p) i ≤ pr1carrier (image p) k
× pr1carrier (image p) j ≤ pr1carrier (image p) k

∥ image p ∥

i: I
image p

      apply to_image; assumption.

∏ i j : image p,
∃ k : image p,
pr1carrier (image p) i ≤ pr1carrier (image p) k
× pr1carrier (image p) j ≤ pr1carrier (image p) k

∏ x : I,
(λ x0 : P,
 ∀ j : image p,
 ∃ k : image p,
 x0 ≤ pr1carrier (image p) k
 ∧ pr1carrier (image p) j ≤ pr1carrier (image p) k)
  (p x)

 ∧ pr1carrier (image p) j ≤ pr1carrier (image p) k)
  (p i)

(λ y : P,

 p i ≤ pr1carrier (image p) k
 ∧ y ≤ pr1carrier (image p) k) (p j)

      
P: Poset

(∑ k : I, p i ≤ p k × p j ≤ p k)
→ ∃ k : image p,
  p i ≤ pr1carrier (image p) k
  ∧ p j ≤ pr1carrier (image p) k

p: I → P

le_jk: p j ≤ p k

∧ p j ≤ pr1carrier (image p) k

p: I → P

i, j, k: I
le_ik: p i ≤ p k
le_jk: p j ≤ p k
p i ≤ pr1carrier (image p) (to_image p k)
∧ p j ≤ pr1carrier (image p) (to_image p k)

      split; assumption.
  Defined.

  
P: Poset
Directed_family P → Directed_hsubtype P

  
P: Poset
Directed_family P → Directed_hsubtype P

    
P: Poset
p: Directed_family P
Directed_hsubtype P

p: Directed_family P
isdirected (pr1carrier (image p))

    apply image_is_directed, directed_property.
  Defined.


New coercion path [Directed_of_Directed_hsubtype;
                   directed_family] : Directed_hsubtype >-> Funclass is ambiguous with existing 
[pr1_Directed_hsubtype; id_hsubtype] : Directed_hsubtype >-> Funclass.
[ambiguous-paths,coercions,default]


Section Completeness.

  (* TODO: show that completeness is a property,
     once we’ve shown above that least upper bounds are unique. *)

  Definition is_complete (P : Poset) : UU
  := ∏ A : hsubtype P, least_upper_bound (pr1carrier A).

  (** [is_complete] is defined just in terms of hsubtypes, to agree with the classical definition and keep its quantification “small”.

  However, it implies completeness for arbitrarily families. *)
  (* TODO: consider naming! *)
  
P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
I: UU
f: I → P
least_upper_bound f

  
P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
I: UU
f: I → P
least_upper_bound f

    apply least_upper_bound_image, P_complete.
  Defined.

  Definition is_chain_complete (P : Poset) : UU
  := ∏ C : Chain_hsubtype P, least_upper_bound_subtype C.

  (** Like [is_complete], [is_chain_complete] is defined just in terms of hsubtype-chains, to keep quantification small.

  However, it implies least upper bounds for arbitarily-indexed chains. *)
  
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
p: Chain P
least_upper_bound p

  
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
p: Chain P
least_upper_bound p

    
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
p: Chain P
least_upper_bound (pr1carrier (image p))

    exact (P_CC (image_chain p)).
  Defined.

  (** Version with [is_chain] split out, for easier application *)
  
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
I: UU
p: I → P
is_chain p → least_upper_bound p

  
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
I: UU
p: I → P
is_chain p → least_upper_bound p

    
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
I: UU
p: I → P
p_chain: is_chain p
least_upper_bound p
 exact (chain_lub P_CC (I,,(p,,p_chain))).
  Defined.

  Definition is_directed_complete (P : Poset) : UU
  := ∏ A : Directed_hsubtype P, least_upper_bound (directed_family A).

  (** Like [is_complete], [is_directed_complete] is defined just in terms of directed subtypes, to keep quantification small.

  However, it implies least upper bounds for arbitary directed families. *)
  
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
p: Directed_family P
least_upper_bound p

  
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
p: Directed_family P
least_upper_bound p

    
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
p: Directed_family P
least_upper_bound (pr1carrier (image p))

    exact (P_DC (image_directed p)).
  Defined.

  
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
I: Type
p: I → P
p_directed: isdirected p
least_upper_bound p

  
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
I: Type
p: I → P
p_directed: isdirected p
least_upper_bound p

    exact (directed_lub P_DC (make_directed p_directed)).
  Defined.

  (* TODO: unify this treatment of directed completeness with that given in [Algebra.Dcpo] *)
End Completeness.

(** ** Upper bounds, completeness, etc in sub-posets *)
Section Subposets.

  (* TODO: upstream to [Posets.Subposets]? *)
  Definition subposet_incl {P : Poset} {A : Subposet' P} : posetmorphism A P
  := pr1 (pr2 A).

  
P: Poset
A: Subposet P
I: Type
p: I → A
x: A
isupperbound (subposet_incl ∘ p) (subposet_incl x) <->
isupperbound p x

  
P: Poset
A: Subposet P
I: Type
p: I → A
x: A
isupperbound (subposet_incl ∘ p) (subposet_incl x) <->
isupperbound p x

    split; auto.
  Defined.

  (* TODO: unsure which arguments should be implicit. Revisit this after some use downstream! *)
  (** Given a chain in a sub-poset with a least upper bound in the ambient poset,
  if the l.u.b. lies in the sub-poset, then it’s an l.u.b. there. *)
  
P: Poset
A: Subposet P
I: Type
p: I → A
x: A
x_lub: is_least_upper_bound (subposet_incl ∘ p)
  (subposet_incl x)
is_least_upper_bound p x

  
P: Poset
A: Subposet P
I: Type
p: I → A
x: A
x_lub: is_least_upper_bound (subposet_incl ∘ p)
  (subposet_incl x)
is_least_upper_bound p x

    
P: Poset
A: Subposet P
I: Type
p: I → A
x: A
x_lub: is_least_upper_bound (subposet_incl ∘ p)
  (subposet_incl x)
isupperbound_hprop p x
P: Poset
A: Subposet P
I: Type
p: I → A
x: A
x_lub: is_least_upper_bound (subposet_incl ∘ p)
  (subposet_incl x)
islowerbound_subtype (isupperbound_hprop p) x

    
P: Poset
A: Subposet P
I: Type
p: I → A
x: A
x_lub: is_least_upper_bound (subposet_incl ∘ p)
  (subposet_incl x)
isupperbound_hprop p x
 apply is_upper_bound_in_subposet, x_lub.
    
P: Poset
A: Subposet P
I: Type
p: I → A
x: A
x_lub: is_least_upper_bound (subposet_incl ∘ p)
  (subposet_incl x)
islowerbound_subtype (isupperbound_hprop p) x
 
P: Poset
A: Subposet P
I: Type
p: I → A
x: A
x_lub: is_least_upper_bound (subposet_incl ∘ p)
  (subposet_incl x)
x': A
x'_ub: isupperbound_hprop p x'
x ≤ pr1carrier (isupperbound_hprop p) (x',, x'_ub)

      
P: Poset
A: Subposet P
I: Type
p: I → A
x: A
x_lub: is_least_upper_bound (subposet_incl ∘ p)
  (subposet_incl x)
x': A
x'_ub: isupperbound_hprop p x'
isupperbound (subposet_incl ∘ p)
  (pr1
     (pr1carrier (isupperbound_hprop p) (x',, x'_ub)))

      apply is_upper_bound_in_subposet; assumption.
  Defined.

  
P: Poset
A: Subposet P
I: Type
p: I → A
x: least_upper_bound (pr1 ∘ p)
x_A: A x
least_upper_bound p

  
P: Poset
A: Subposet P
I: Type
p: I → A
x: least_upper_bound (pr1 ∘ p)
x_A: A x
least_upper_bound p

    
P: Poset
A: Subposet P
I: Type
p: I → A
x: least_upper_bound (pr1 ∘ p)
x_A: A x
A
P: Poset
A: Subposet P
I: Type
p: I → A
x: least_upper_bound (pr1 ∘ p)
x_A: A x
is_least_upper_bound p ?x

    
P: Poset
A: Subposet P
I: Type
p: I → A
x: least_upper_bound (pr1 ∘ p)
x_A: A x
A
 
P: Poset
A: Subposet P
I: Type
p: I → A
x: least_upper_bound (pr1 ∘ p)
x_A: A x
A x
 apply x_A. 
P: Poset
A: Subposet P
I: Type
p: I → A
x: least_upper_bound (pr1 ∘ p)
x_A: A x
is_least_upper_bound p (x,, x_A)

    apply is_least_upper_bound_in_subposet, least_upper_bound_property.
  Defined.

  
P: Poset
A: Subposet P
I: Type
p: I → A
is_chain p <-> is_chain (subposet_incl ∘ p)

  
P: Poset
A: Subposet P
I: Type
p: I → A
is_chain p <-> is_chain (subposet_incl ∘ p)

    split; auto.
  Defined.

  (* This lemma can be given in several alternative forms,
  e.g. in terms of the canonical given lubs, or arbitrary lubs;
  and in terms of chains in [A], or chains in [P] satisfying [A];
  and in terms of general chains, or subtype-chains.

  TODO: once it’s in use, reconsider which form might be best. *)
  
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
A: Subposet P
A_chain_closed: ∏ C : Chain_hsubtype A,
A
  (chain_lub P_CC
     (fmap_chain subposet_incl C))
is_chain_complete A

  
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
A: Subposet P
A_chain_closed: ∏ C : Chain_hsubtype A,
A
  (chain_lub P_CC
     (fmap_chain subposet_incl C))
is_chain_complete A

    
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
A: Subposet P
A_chain_closed: ∏ C : Chain_hsubtype A,
A
  (chain_lub P_CC
     (fmap_chain subposet_incl C))
C: Chain_hsubtype A
least_upper_bound_subtype C

    
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
A: Subposet P
A_chain_closed: ∏ C : Chain_hsubtype A,
A
  (chain_lub P_CC
     (fmap_chain subposet_incl C))
C: Chain_hsubtype A
A
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
A: Subposet P
A_chain_closed: ∏ C : Chain_hsubtype A,
A
  (chain_lub P_CC
     (fmap_chain subposet_incl C))
C: Chain_hsubtype A
is_least_upper_bound (pr1carrier C) ?x

    
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
A: Subposet P
A_chain_closed: ∏ C : Chain_hsubtype A,
A
  (chain_lub P_CC
     (fmap_chain subposet_incl C))
C: Chain_hsubtype A
A
 
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
A: Subposet P
A_chain_closed: ∏ C : Chain_hsubtype A,
A
  (chain_lub P_CC
     (fmap_chain subposet_incl C))
C: Chain_hsubtype A
A (chain_lub P_CC (fmap_chain subposet_incl C))

      apply A_chain_closed. 
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
A: Subposet P
A_chain_closed: ∏ C : Chain_hsubtype A,
A
  (chain_lub P_CC
     (fmap_chain subposet_incl C))
C: Chain_hsubtype A
is_least_upper_bound (pr1carrier C)
  (chain_lub P_CC (fmap_chain subposet_incl C),,
   A_chain_closed C)

    
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
A: Subposet P
A_chain_closed: ∏ C : Chain_hsubtype A,
A
  (chain_lub P_CC
     (fmap_chain subposet_incl C))
C: Chain_hsubtype A
is_least_upper_bound (subposet_incl ∘ pr1carrier C)
  (subposet_incl
     (chain_lub P_CC (fmap_chain subposet_incl C),,
      A_chain_closed C))

    apply least_upper_bound_property.
  Defined.

  (* TODO: add similar treatment of directed-completeness in subsets. *)

End Subposets.

(** ** Function posets

Products of posets; posets of (classes of) functions *)

Section Function_Posets.

  (** The most general poset of functions is just the product of a family of posets.

  We set this up first, and then give other posets of functions (e.g. the poset of poset maps) as subposets of this general one. *)
(* TODO: possibly some examples upstream could eventually be unified with this,
e.g. [dcpoofdcpomorphisms]? *)
  Definition pointwiseorder {X:UU} (P : X -> Poset) : hrel (∏ x, P x)
  := fun f g => ∀ x, f x ≤ g x.

  
X: UU
P: X → Poset
isPartialOrder (pointwiseorder P)

  
X: UU
P: X → Poset
isPartialOrder (pointwiseorder P)

    
X: UU
P: X → Poset
istrans (pointwiseorder P)
X: UU
P: X → Poset
isrefl (pointwiseorder P)
X: UU
P: X → Poset
isantisymm (pointwiseorder P)

    
X: UU
P: X → Poset
istrans (pointwiseorder P)
 
X: UU
P: X → Poset
x1, x2, x3: ∏ x : X, P x
X0: pointwiseorder P x1 x2
X1: pointwiseorder P x2 x3
x: X
x1 x ≤ x3 x
 eapply istrans_posetRelation; auto.
    
X: UU
P: X → Poset
isrefl (pointwiseorder P)
 
X: UU
P: X → Poset
x: ∏ x : X, P x
x0: X
x x0 ≤ x x0
 apply isrefl_posetRelation.
    
X: UU
P: X → Poset
isantisymm (pointwiseorder P)
 
X: UU
P: X → Poset
f, g: ∏ x : X, P x
le_f_g: pointwiseorder P f g
le_g_f: pointwiseorder P g f
(f = g)%type

      
X: UU
P: X → Poset
f, g: ∏ x : X, P x
le_f_g: pointwiseorder P f g
le_g_f: pointwiseorder P g f
x: X
(f x = g x)%type

      apply isantisymm_posetRelation; auto.
  Defined.

  (** Note: could also be called e.g. [Poset_product], or various other names. *)
  (* TODO: consider naming convention. Are there analogous constructions elsewhere in UniMath that this should fit with?
  This name fits with type-theoretical lemmas in UniMath, but is less natural from a classical mathematical perspective.
*)
  
X: UU
P: X → Poset
Poset

  
X: UU
P: X → Poset
Poset

    
X: UU
P: X → Poset
hSet
X: UU
P: X → Poset
PartialOrder ?X
 
X: UU
P: X → Poset
hSet
 exact (forall_hSet P). 
X: UU
P: X → Poset
PartialOrder (∏ x : X, P x)%set

    
X: UU
P: X → Poset
hrel (∏ x : X, P x)%set
X: UU
P: X → Poset
isPartialOrder ?R
 
X: UU
P: X → Poset
hrel (∏ x : X, P x)%set
 apply pointwiseorder. 
X: UU
P: X → Poset
isPartialOrder (pointwiseorder P)

    apply ispartialorder_pointwiseorder.
  Defined.

  Definition arrow_Poset (X:UU) (P : Poset) : Poset
    := forall_Poset (fun _:X => P).

  
X: UU
P: X → Poset
I: Type
f: I → forall_Poset P
g: forall_Poset P
isupperbound f g <->
(∏ x : X, isupperbound (λ i : I, f i x) (g x))

  
X: UU
P: X → Poset
I: Type
f: I → forall_Poset P
g: forall_Poset P
isupperbound f g <->
(∏ x : X, isupperbound (λ i : I, f i x) (g x))

    split; intro H; repeat intro; use H.
  Defined.

  Definition is_least_upper_bound_pointwise {X:UU} {P : X -> Poset}
      {I} (f : I -> forall_Poset P)
      (g : forall_Poset P)
    : hProp
  := ∀ x, is_least_upper_bound (fun i => f i x) (g x).

  
X: UU
P: X → Poset
I: Type
f: I → forall_Poset P
g: forall_Poset P
is_least_upper_bound_pointwise f g
→ is_least_upper_bound f g

  
X: UU
P: X → Poset
I: Type
f: I → forall_Poset P
g: forall_Poset P
is_least_upper_bound_pointwise f g
→ is_least_upper_bound f g

    
X: UU
P: X → Poset
I: Type
f: I → forall_Poset P
g: forall_Poset P
pointwise_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise f g
is_least_upper_bound f g

    
X: UU
P: X → Poset
I: Type
f: I → forall_Poset P
g: forall_Poset P
pointwise_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise f g
g_pwlub:= λ x : X,
make_least_upper_bound 
  (g x) (pointwise_lub x): ∏ x : X, least_upper_bound (λ i : I, f i x)
is_least_upper_bound f g

    
X: UU
P: X → Poset
I: Type
f: I → forall_Poset P
g: forall_Poset P
pointwise_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise f g
g_pwlub:= λ x : X,
make_least_upper_bound 
  (g x) (pointwise_lub x): ∏ x : X, least_upper_bound (λ i : I, f i x)
isupperbound_hprop f g
X: UU
P: X → Poset
I: Type
f: I → forall_Poset P
g: forall_Poset P
pointwise_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise f g
g_pwlub:= λ x : X,
make_least_upper_bound 
  (g x) (pointwise_lub x): ∏ x : X, least_upper_bound (λ i : I, f i x)
islowerbound_subtype (isupperbound_hprop f) g

    
X: UU
P: X → Poset
I: Type
f: I → forall_Poset P
g: forall_Poset P
pointwise_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise f g
g_pwlub:= λ x : X,
make_least_upper_bound 
  (g x) (pointwise_lub x): ∏ x : X, least_upper_bound (λ i : I, f i x)
isupperbound_hprop f g
 
X: UU
P: X → Poset
I: Type
f: I → forall_Poset P
g: forall_Poset P
pointwise_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise f g
g_pwlub:= λ x : X,
make_least_upper_bound 
  (g x) (pointwise_lub x): ∏ x : X, least_upper_bound (λ i : I, f i x)
i: I
x: X
f i x ≤ g x

      apply (least_upper_bound_is_upper_bound (g_pwlub x)).
    
X: UU
P: X → Poset
I: Type
f: I → forall_Poset P
g: forall_Poset P
pointwise_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise f g
g_pwlub:= λ x : X,
make_least_upper_bound 
  (g x) (pointwise_lub x): ∏ x : X, least_upper_bound (λ i : I, f i x)
islowerbound_subtype (isupperbound_hprop f) g
 
X: UU
P: X → Poset
I: Type
f: I → forall_Poset P
g: forall_Poset P
pointwise_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise f g
g_pwlub:= λ x : X,
make_least_upper_bound 
  (g x) (pointwise_lub x): ∏ x : X, least_upper_bound (λ i : I, f i x)
g': forall_Poset P
g'_ub: isupperbound_hprop f g'
x: X
g x ≤ pr1carrier (isupperbound_hprop f) (g',, g'_ub) x

      
X: UU
P: X → Poset
I: Type
f: I → forall_Poset P
g: forall_Poset P
pointwise_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise f g
g_pwlub:= λ x : X,
make_least_upper_bound 
  (g x) (pointwise_lub x): ∏ x : X, least_upper_bound (λ i : I, f i x)
g': forall_Poset P
g'_ub: isupperbound_hprop f g'
x: X
isupperbound (λ i : I, f i x)
  (pr1carrier (isupperbound_hprop f) (g',, g'_ub) x)

      apply isupperbound_if_pointwise, g'_ub.
  Defined.


P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P → P
f_monot: ∏ i : I, isaposetmorphism (f i)
g: forall_Poset (λ _ : P, P)
g_pw_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise f g
isaposetmorphism g

f_monot: ∏ i : I, isaposetmorphism (f i)
g: forall_Poset (λ _ : P, P)
g_pw_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise f g
isaposetmorphism g

g: forall_Poset (λ _ : P, P)
g_pw_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise f g
x, y: P
le_x_y: x ≤ y
g x ≤ g y

g: forall_Poset (λ _ : P, P)
g_pw_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise f g
x, y: P
le_x_y: x ≤ y
isupperbound (λ i : I, f i x) (g y)

f i x ≤ g y

f: I → P → P
f_monot: ∏ i : I, isaposetmorphism (f i)
g: forall_Poset (λ _ : P, P)
g_pw_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise f g
x, y: P
le_x_y: x ≤ y
i: I
f i x ≤ ?x2
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P → P
f_monot: ∏ i : I, isaposetmorphism (f i)
g: forall_Poset (λ _ : P, P)
g_pw_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise f g
x, y: P
le_x_y: x ≤ y
i: I
?x2 ≤ g y

  
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P → P
f_monot: ∏ i : I, isaposetmorphism (f i)
g: forall_Poset (λ _ : P, P)
g_pw_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise f g
x, y: P
le_x_y: x ≤ y
i: I
?x2 ≤ g y
 apply (least_upper_bound_is_upper_bound
                (make_least_upper_bound _ (g_pw_lub _))). 
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P → P
f_monot: ∏ i : I, isaposetmorphism (f i)
g: forall_Poset (λ _ : P, P)
g_pw_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise f g
x, y: P
le_x_y: x ≤ y
i: I
f i x ≤ f ?i y

  apply f_monot; assumption.
Defined.

End Function_Posets.


(** ** Classes of maps *)

(** Progressive maps as also known as ascending, inflationary, increasing, and more.

Note these are just endo-_functions_, not “maps” in the sense of morphisms of posets. *)

Section ProgressiveMaps.

Definition isprogressive {P : Poset} : hsubtype (P -> P) : UU
  := fun f => ∀ (x : P), x ≤ f x.

Definition Progressive_map (P : Poset) := carrier (@isprogressive P).

Definition pr1_Progressive_map {P : Poset} : Progressive_map P -> (P -> P)
:= pr1carrier _.
Coercion pr1_Progressive_map : Progressive_map >-> Funclass.

Definition progressive_property {P} (f : Progressive_map P)
  : isprogressive f
:= pr2 f.


P: Poset
isprogressive (idfun P)


P: Poset
isprogressive (idfun P)

  intro; apply isrefl_posetRelation.
Defined.


P: Poset
f, g: P → P
f_prog: isprogressive f
g_prog: isprogressive g
isprogressive (f ∘ g)


P: Poset
f, g: P → P
f_prog: isprogressive f
g_prog: isprogressive g
isprogressive (f ∘ g)

  
P: Poset
f, g: P → P
f_prog: isprogressive f
g_prog: isprogressive g
x: P
x ≤ (f ∘ g) x
 
P: Poset
f, g: P → P
f_prog: isprogressive f
g_prog: isprogressive g
x: P
x ≤ ?x2
P: Poset
f, g: P → P
f_prog: isprogressive f
g_prog: isprogressive g
x: P
?x2 ≤ (f ∘ g) x

  
P: Poset
f, g: P → P
f_prog: isprogressive f
g_prog: isprogressive g
x: P
x ≤ ?x2
 use g_prog.
  
P: Poset
f, g: P → P
f_prog: isprogressive f
g_prog: isprogressive g
x: P
g x ≤ (f ∘ g) x
 use f_prog.
Defined.



P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P → P
f_prog: ∏ i : I, isprogressive (f i)
g: forall_Poset (λ _ : P, P)
g_pw_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise f g
I_inhab: ∥ I ∥
isprogressive g

I_inhab: ∥ I ∥
isprogressive g

?X → x ≤ g x

∏ i : I, f i x ≤ g x

  (* TODO: make version that takes the [is_lub] as separate input *)
  
P: Poset
I: Type
f: I → P → P
f_prog: ∏ i : I, isprogressive (f i)
g: forall_Poset (λ _ : P, P)
g_pw_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise f g
I_inhab: ∥ I ∥
x: P
is_least_upper_bound (λ i : I, f i x) (g x)

  use g_pw_lub.
Defined.

End ProgressiveMaps.

(** ** Fixpoints of endofunctions *)

Section Fixpoints.

(* TODO: this approach to types of fixedpoints doesn’t play well with the setup of subposets. Perhaps try refactoring? But working with hsubtypes/subposets throughout creates so much extra [pr1] overhead, impacting readability; this approach avoids that nicely. *)

Definition isfixedpoint {P : Poset} (f : P -> P) : hsubtype P
  := fun (x:P) => f x = x.

Definition Fixedpoint {P : Poset} (f : P -> P) : UU := carrier (isfixedpoint f).

Coercion pr1_Fixedpoint {P : Poset} {f : P -> P} : Fixedpoint f -> P
:= pr1carrier _.

Definition fixedpoint_property  {P : Poset} {f : P -> P} (x : Fixedpoint f)
  : f x = x
:= pr2 x.

Definition ispostfixedpoint {P : Poset} (f : P -> P) : hsubtype P
  := fun (x:P) => x ≤ f x.

Definition Postfixedpoint {P : Poset} (f : P -> P) : UU
  := carrier (ispostfixedpoint f).

Coercion pr1_Postfixedpoint {P : Poset} {f : P -> P} : Postfixedpoint f -> P
:= pr1carrier _.

Definition postfixedpoint_property  {P : Poset} {f : P -> P} (x : Postfixedpoint f)
  : x ≤ f x
:= pr2 x.

End Fixpoints.


(** ** The (Knaster–)Tarski fixpoint theorems

This classical theorem is in several forms.  The strong general form, due to Tarski, states that given a monotone endo-map [f] on a complete poset [P], the sub-poset of fixed points of [f] is again complete.  The key lemma for this is close to the earlier weaker form, due essentially to Knaster and Tarski independently: a monotone endo-map [f] on a complete poset [P] has a least fixed point above any post-fixed point.
*)
Section Tarski.


P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P
x0_postfix: x0 ≤ f x0
least_suchthat (λ x : P, f x = x ∧ x0 ≤ x)


P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P
x0_postfix: x0 ≤ f x0
least_suchthat (λ x : P, f x = x ∧ x0 ≤ x)

  (* Let C be the least subset containing x0 that is closed under f and taking least upper bounds.
   We take some time to set up C and its universal property cleanly. *)
  
P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P
x0_postfix: x0 ≤ f x0
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
least_suchthat (λ x : P, f x = x ∧ x0 ≤ x)

  
P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P
x0_postfix: x0 ≤ f x0
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_sup_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
least_suchthat (λ x : P, f x = x ∧ x0 ≤ x)

  
P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P
x0_postfix: x0 ≤ f x0
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_sup_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
least_suchthat (λ x : P, f x = x ∧ x0 ≤ x)

P_complete: is_complete P

x0: P

:

 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C x0

:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C x0
 intros A A_x0 A_f_closed A_sup_closed; assumption.

:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_sup_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_x0: C x0
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
is_sup_closed C

P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P
x0_postfix: x0 ≤ f x0

:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_sup_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))

C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_x0: C x0
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_sup_closed: is_sup_closed C
least_suchthat (λ x : P, f x = x ∧ x0 ≤ x)

P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P

:

 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:

C_sup_closed: is_sup_closed C

A x0
⇒ is_f_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ is_sup_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A

A x0
⇒ is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
  ⇒ is_sup_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A

P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P
x0_postfix: x0 ≤ f x0
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_sup_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_x0: C x0
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_sup_closed: is_sup_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
A x0
⇒ is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
  ⇒ is_sup_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
least_suchthat (λ x : P, f x = x ∧ x0 ≤ x)

  (* Now establish a few facts about C and (post-)fixed points *)
  
P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P
x0_postfix: x0 ≤ f x0
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_sup_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_x0: C x0
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_sup_closed: is_sup_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
A x0
⇒ is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
  ⇒ is_sup_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_sup_closed (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)

hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_x0: C x0
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_sup_closed: is_sup_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
A x0
⇒ is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
  ⇒ is_sup_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
postfix_supclosed: is_sup_closed (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
postfix_C: C ⊆ (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
least_suchthat (λ x : P, f x = x ∧ x0 ≤ x)

  
P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P
x0_postfix: x0 ≤ f x0
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_sup_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_x0: C x0
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_sup_closed: is_sup_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
A x0
⇒ is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
  ⇒ is_sup_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
postfix_supclosed: is_sup_closed (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
C ⊆ (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)

P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P
x0_postfix: x0 ≤ f x0
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_sup_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_x0: C x0
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_sup_closed: is_sup_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
A x0
⇒ is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
  ⇒ is_sup_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
postfix_supclosed: is_sup_closed (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
postfix_C: C ⊆ (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
∏ x : P, f x = x ⇒ x0 ≤ x ⇒ C ⊆ (λ y : P, y ≤ x)

postfix_C: C ⊆ (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
C_below_allfix: ∏ x : P,
f x = x
⇒ x0 ≤ x ⇒ C ⊆ (λ y : P, y ≤ x)
least_suchthat (λ x : P, f x = x ∧ x0 ≤ x)

x0: P
x0_postfix: x0 ≤ f x0
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_sup_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_x0: C x0
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_sup_closed: is_sup_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
A x0
⇒ is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
  ⇒ is_sup_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
postfix_supclosed: is_sup_closed (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
postfix_C: C ⊆ (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
x: P
x_fix: f x = x
leq_x0_x: x0 ≤ x
A: hsubtype P
IH_A: A ⊆ (λ y : P, y ≤ x) ∩ C
((λ y : P, y ≤ x) ∩ C) (P_complete A)
 
P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P
x0_postfix: x0 ≤ f x0
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_sup_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_x0: C x0
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_sup_closed: is_sup_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
A x0
⇒ is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
  ⇒ is_sup_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
postfix_supclosed: is_sup_closed (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
postfix_C: C ⊆ (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
x: P
x_fix: f x = x
leq_x0_x: x0 ≤ x
A: hsubtype P
IH_A: A ⊆ (λ y : P, y ≤ x) ∩ C
P_complete A ≤ x

 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:

C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:

postfix_C: C ⊆ (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
x: P

leq_x0_x: x0 ≤ x

IH_A: A ⊆ (λ y : P, y ≤ x) ∩ C
C (P_complete A)

           apply (istrans_subtype_containment IH_A),
                 subtype_binaryintersection_leq2.

P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P

 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_x0: C x0
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_sup_closed: is_sup_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
A x0
⇒ is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
  ⇒ is_sup_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
postfix_supclosed: is_sup_closed (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
postfix_C: C ⊆ (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
x: P
x_fix: f x = x
leq_x0_x: x0 ≤ x
A: hsubtype P
IH_A: A ⊆ (λ y : P, y ≤ x) ∩ C
P_complete A ≤ x

      
P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P
x0_postfix: x0 ≤ f x0
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_sup_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_x0: C x0
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_sup_closed: is_sup_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
A x0
⇒ is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
  ⇒ is_sup_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
postfix_supclosed: is_sup_closed (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
postfix_C: C ⊆ (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
x: P
x_fix: f x = x
leq_x0_x: x0 ≤ x
A: hsubtype P
IH_A: A ⊆ (λ y : P, y ≤ x) ∩ C
∏ y : P, A y → y ≤ x

      apply (istrans_subtype_containment IH_A), subtype_binaryintersection_leq1.
  
P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P
x0_postfix: x0 ≤ f x0
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_sup_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_x0: C x0
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_sup_closed: is_sup_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
A x0
⇒ is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
  ⇒ is_sup_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
postfix_supclosed: is_sup_closed (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
postfix_C: C ⊆ (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
C_below_allfix: ∏ x : P,
f x = x
⇒ x0 ≤ x ⇒ C ⊆ (λ y : P, y ≤ x)
least_suchthat (λ x : P, f x = x ∧ x0 ≤ x)

  (* From these, it follows that sup C is a least fixed point. *)
  
P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P
x0_postfix: x0 ≤ f x0
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_sup_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_x0: C x0
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_sup_closed: is_sup_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
A x0
⇒ is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
  ⇒ is_sup_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
postfix_supclosed: is_sup_closed (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
postfix_C: C ⊆ (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
C_below_allfix: ∏ x : P,
f x = x
⇒ x0 ≤ x ⇒ C ⊆ (λ y : P, y ≤ x)
sup_C:= P_complete C: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier C)
least_suchthat (λ x : P, f x = x ∧ x0 ≤ x)

  
P: Poset

f: posetmorphism P P

:

A x0

postfix_supclosed: is_sup_closed (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
postfix_C: C ⊆ (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
C_below_allfix: ∏ x : P,
f x = x
⇒ x0 ≤ x ⇒ C ⊆ (λ y : P, y ≤ x)
sup_C:= P_complete C: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier C)
C sup_C

f x = x
⇒ x0 ≤ x ⇒ C ⊆ (λ y : P, y ≤ x)
sup_C:= P_complete C: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier C)
C_sup_C: C sup_C

P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P

 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_x0: C x0
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_sup_closed: is_sup_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
A x0
⇒ is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
  ⇒ is_sup_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A

C_below_allfix: ∏ x : P,
f x = x
⇒ x0 ≤ x ⇒ C ⊆ (λ y : P, y ≤ x)

P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P
x0_postfix: x0 ≤ f x0
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_sup_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_x0: C x0
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_sup_closed: is_sup_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
A x0
⇒ is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
  ⇒ is_sup_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
postfix_supclosed: is_sup_closed (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
postfix_C: C ⊆ (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
C_below_allfix: ∏ x : P,
f x = x
⇒ x0 ≤ x ⇒ C ⊆ (λ y : P, y ≤ x)
sup_C:= P_complete C: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier C)
C_sup_C: C sup_C
(f sup_C = sup_C)%type

P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P

 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_x0: C x0

C_sup_closed: is_sup_closed C

A x0
⇒ is_f_closed (A ∩ C)

f x = x

sup_C:= P_complete C: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier C)

x0 ≤ sup_C
P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P
x0_postfix: x0 ≤ f x0
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_sup_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_x0: C x0
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_sup_closed: is_sup_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
A x0
⇒ is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
  ⇒ is_sup_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
postfix_supclosed: is_sup_closed (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
postfix_C: C ⊆ (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
C_below_allfix: ∏ x : P,
f x = x
⇒ x0 ≤ x ⇒ C ⊆ (λ y : P, y ≤ x)
sup_C:= P_complete C: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier C)
C_sup_C: C sup_C
∏ x : ∑ x : P, (f x = x)%type × x0 ≤ x, sup_C ≤ pr1 x

  
P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P
x0_postfix: x0 ≤ f x0
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_sup_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_x0: C x0
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_sup_closed: is_sup_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
A x0
⇒ is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
  ⇒ is_sup_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
postfix_supclosed: is_sup_closed (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
postfix_C: C ⊆ (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
C_below_allfix: ∏ x : P,
f x = x
⇒ x0 ≤ x ⇒ C ⊆ (λ y : P, y ≤ x)
sup_C:= P_complete C: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier C)
C_sup_C: C sup_C
(f sup_C = sup_C)%type
 
P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P
x0_postfix: x0 ≤ f x0
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_sup_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_x0: C x0
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_sup_closed: is_sup_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
A x0
⇒ is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
  ⇒ is_sup_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
postfix_supclosed: is_sup_closed (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
postfix_C: C ⊆ (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
C_below_allfix: ∏ x : P,
f x = x
⇒ x0 ≤ x ⇒ C ⊆ (λ y : P, y ≤ x)
sup_C:= P_complete C: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier C)
C_sup_C: C sup_C
f sup_C ≤ sup_C

P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P
x0_postfix: x0 ≤ f x0
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_sup_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_x0: C x0
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_sup_closed: is_sup_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
A x0
⇒ is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
  ⇒ is_sup_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
postfix_supclosed: is_sup_closed (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
postfix_C: C ⊆ (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
C_below_allfix: ∏ x : P,
f x = x
⇒ x0 ≤ x ⇒ C ⊆ (λ y : P, y ≤ x)
sup_C:= P_complete C: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier C)
C_sup_C: C sup_C
∏ x : ∑ x : P, (f x = x)%type × x0 ≤ x, sup_C ≤ pr1 x
 
P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x0: P
x0_postfix: x0 ≤ f x0
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_sup_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : hsubtype P,
 C' ⊆ A ⇒ A (P_complete C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 A x0 ⇒ is_f_closed A ⇒ is_sup_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_x0: C x0
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_sup_closed: is_sup_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
A x0
⇒ is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
  ⇒ is_sup_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
postfix_supclosed: is_sup_closed (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
postfix_C: C ⊆ (λ x : P, x ≤ f x)
C_below_allfix: ∏ x : P,
f x = x
⇒ x0 ≤ x ⇒ C ⊆ (λ y : P, y ≤ x)
sup_C:= P_complete C: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier C)
C_sup_C: C sup_C
x: P
x_fix: (f x = x)%type
leq_x0_x: x0 ≤ x
sup_C ≤ x

    apply least_upper_bound_subtype_univ, C_below_allfix; assumption.
Defined.


P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
is_complete ((λ x : P, f x = x) : Subposet P)


P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
is_complete ((λ x : P, f x = x) : Subposet P)

  
P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
A: hsubtype (λ x : P, f x = x)
least_upper_bound (pr1carrier A)

  
P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
A: hsubtype (λ x : P, f x = x)
A_in_P:= λ x : P,
(∑ x_fix : (f x = x)%logic, A (x,, x_fix))%prop: P → hProp
least_upper_bound (pr1carrier A)

P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
A: hsubtype (λ x : P, f x = x)

(∑ x_fix : (f x = x)%logic, A (x,, x_fix))%prop: P → hProp
sup_P_A:= P_complete A_in_P: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier A_in_P)
least_upper_bound (pr1carrier A)

  
P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
A: hsubtype (λ x : P, f x = x)
A_in_P:= λ x : P,
(∑ x_fix : (f x = x)%logic, A (x,, x_fix))%prop: P → hProp
sup_P_A:= P_complete A_in_P: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier A_in_P)
least_suchthat (λ x : P, f x = x ∧ sup_P_A ≤ x)

sup_fix_A: least_suchthat
  (λ x : P, f x = x ∧ sup_P_A ≤ x)
sup_A_isfix: (f sup_fix_A = sup_fix_A)%type
λ x : P, f x = x
P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
A: hsubtype (λ x : P, f x = x)
A_in_P:= λ x : P,
(∑ x_fix : (f x = x)%logic, A (x,, x_fix))%prop: P → hProp
sup_P_A:= P_complete A_in_P: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier A_in_P)
sup_fix_A: least_suchthat
  (λ x : P, f x = x ∧ sup_P_A ≤ x)
sup_A_isfix: (f sup_fix_A = sup_fix_A)%type
is_least_upper_bound (pr1carrier A) ?x

sup_fix_A: least_suchthat
  (λ x : P, f x = x ∧ sup_P_A ≤ x)
sup_A_isfix: (f sup_fix_A = sup_fix_A)%type
λ x : P, f x = x

f sup_fix_A = sup_fix_A

P_complete: is_complete P

 apply (least_suchthat_satisfies sup_fix_A).

f: posetmorphism P P

x_fix: f x = x
x_ub: isupperbound_hprop (pr1carrier A) (x,, x_fix)
sup_fix_A,, sup_A_isfix
≤ pr1carrier (isupperbound_hprop (pr1carrier A))
    ((x,, x_fix),, x_ub)

(f x = x)%type × sup_P_A ≤ x

f: posetmorphism P P
A: hsubtype (λ x : P, f x = x)

sup_fix_A: least_suchthat
  (λ x : P, f x = x ∧ sup_P_A ≤ x)
sup_A_isfix: (f sup_fix_A = sup_fix_A)%type

x_fix: f x = x
x_ub: isupperbound_hprop (pr1carrier A) (x,, x_fix)
∏ y : P, A_in_P y → y ≤ x

    
P: Poset
P_complete: is_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
A: hsubtype (λ x : P, f x = x)
A_in_P:= λ x : P,
(∑ x_fix : (f x = x)%logic, A (x,, x_fix))%prop: P → hProp
sup_P_A:= P_complete A_in_P: least_upper_bound (pr1carrier A_in_P)
sup_fix_A: least_suchthat
  (λ x : P, f x = x ∧ sup_P_A ≤ x)
sup_A_isfix: (f sup_fix_A = sup_fix_A)%type
x: P
x_fix: f x = x
x_ub: isupperbound_hprop (pr1carrier A) (x,, x_fix)
y: P
y_fix: f y = y
A_y: A (y,, y_fix)
y ≤ x

    use (x_ub ((_,,_),,_)); assumption.
Defined.

End Tarski.

(** ** Bourbaki-Witt

The classical Bourbaki–Witt theorem says: Any progressive map on a chain-complete partial order has a fixed point.

Constructively, this may fail, as shown in Bauer–Lumsdaine https://arxiv.org/abs/1201.0340. Here we aim to give both the classical theorem, and some weaker constructively-provable results.
*)

Section Bourbaki_Witt.

Definition Bourbaki_Witt_property (P : Poset)
  := ∏ (f : Progressive_map P), Fixedpoint f.

(** Theorem traditionally credited to Bourbaki (1949) and Witt (1951). This proof is based on Lang, Algebra (2002), Appendix 2, Thm 2.1. *)

LEM
→ ∏ P : Poset,
  is_chain_complete P → Bourbaki_Witt_property P


LEM
→ ∏ P : Poset,
  is_chain_complete P → Bourbaki_Witt_property P

(* Let C be the least subset closed under f and suprema of chains.
   We take some time to set up C and its universal property cleanly. *)
  
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
Fixedpoint f

  
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
Fixedpoint f

  
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
Fixedpoint f

  
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
Fixedpoint f

  
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
is_f_closed C
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
Fixedpoint f

  
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
is_f_closed C

P: Poset

f: Progressive_map P

:

 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
x: P
C_x: C x
A: hsubtype P
A_f_closed: is_f_closed A
A_chain_closed: is_chain_closed A
A (f x)

    
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp

 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
x: P
C_x: C x
A: hsubtype P
A_f_closed: is_f_closed A
A_chain_closed: is_chain_closed A
A x
 use C_x; assumption. 
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P

:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp

 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:

Fixedpoint f

  
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P

:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp

 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
is_chain_closed C
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P

:

 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
