 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)

P: Poset

f: Progressive_map P

 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P

P: Poset

f: Progressive_map P

hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp

 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
x: Chain_hsubtype P
C_x: ∏ y : x, C (pr1 y)
A: hsubtype P
A_f_closed: is_f_closed A
A_chain_closed: is_chain_closed A
A (P_CC x)

    
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
x: Chain_hsubtype P
C_x: ∏ y : x, C (pr1 y)
A: hsubtype P
A_f_closed: is_f_closed A
A_chain_closed: is_chain_closed A
∏ y : x, A (pr1 y)
 intro; use C_x; assumption.

P: Poset

f: Progressive_map P

 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
Fixedpoint f

P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P

:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp

 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A

P: Poset

f: Progressive_map P

is_f_closed (A ∩ C)

f: Progressive_map P

H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp

 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
A: hsubtype P
A_chain_closed: is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
A_f_closed: is_chain_closed (A ∩ C)
x: P
Cx: C x
A x

    apply (Cx (fun x => A x ∧ C x)); assumption. 
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
Fixedpoint f

  (* Now, if C is a chain, then its least upper bound will be a fixed point. *)
  
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_chain (pr1carrier C)
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P

:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp

 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
C_is_chain: is_chain (pr1carrier C)
Fixedpoint f

P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P

:

 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P

C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C

H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
C_is_chain: is_chain (pr1carrier C)
C_Chain:= C,, C_is_chain : Chain_hsubtype P: Chain_hsubtype P
Fixedpoint f

    
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
C_is_chain: is_chain (pr1carrier C)
C_Chain:= C,, C_is_chain : Chain_hsubtype P: Chain_hsubtype P
isfixedpoint f (P_CC C_Chain)

    
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
C_is_chain: is_chain (pr1carrier C)
C_Chain:= C,, C_is_chain : Chain_hsubtype P: Chain_hsubtype P
f (P_CC C_Chain) ≤ P_CC C_Chain
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
C_is_chain: is_chain (pr1carrier C)
C_Chain:= C,, C_is_chain : Chain_hsubtype P: Chain_hsubtype P
P_CC C_Chain ≤ f (P_CC C_Chain)
 
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
C_is_chain: is_chain (pr1carrier C)
C_Chain:= C,, C_is_chain : Chain_hsubtype P: Chain_hsubtype P
P_CC C_Chain ≤ f (P_CC C_Chain)
 use progressive_property. 
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
C_is_chain: is_chain (pr1carrier C)
C_Chain:= C,, C_is_chain : Chain_hsubtype P: Chain_hsubtype P
f (P_CC C_Chain) ≤ P_CC C_Chain

    
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
C_is_chain: is_chain (pr1carrier C)
C_Chain:= C,, C_is_chain : Chain_hsubtype P: Chain_hsubtype P
C_Chain (pr1 f (P_CC C_Chain))

    
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
C_is_chain: is_chain (pr1carrier C)
C_Chain:= C,, C_is_chain : Chain_hsubtype P: Chain_hsubtype P
C (P_CC C_Chain)

    
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
C_is_chain: is_chain (pr1carrier C)
C_Chain:= C,, C_is_chain : Chain_hsubtype P: Chain_hsubtype P
∏ y : C_Chain, C (pr1 y)

    intros [? ?]; assumption.
  
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_chain (pr1carrier C)

  (* It remains to show C is a chain. This is the hard (and nonconstructive) part.
  Say [x ∈ C] is a _bottleneck_ if for all y ≤ x in C, either [f y ≤ x] or [y = x].
  We show, in each case by C-induction:
  (1) if x is a bottleneck, then for all y in C, y ≤ x or f x ≤ y;
  (2) every x ∈ C is a bottleneck.
  It follows that C is a chain.
  *)
  
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
is_chain (pr1carrier C)

  
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x ⇒ (∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
is_chain (pr1carrier C)

  
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x ⇒ (∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
 
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
x: P
C_x: C x
x_bottleneck: is_bottleneck x
∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y
 
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)

is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
x: P
C_x: C x
x_bottleneck: is_bottleneck x
is_f_closed ((λ x0 : P, x0 ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ x0) ∩ C)

P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P

 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:

P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P

:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp

 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
x: P
C_x: C x
x_bottleneck: is_bottleneck x
y: P
y_comp: y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y
C_y: C y
y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ f y

f y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ f y

y_comp: y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y
C_y: C y
leq_y_x: y ≤ x
f y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
x: P
C_x: C x
x_bottleneck: is_bottleneck x
y: P
y_comp: y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y
C_y: C y
leq_y_x: y ≤ x
y = x ⇒ f x ≤ f y

      
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
x: P
C_x: C x
x_bottleneck: is_bottleneck x
y: P
y_comp: y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y
C_y: C y
leq_y_x: y ≤ x
f y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x
 intro; assumption.
      
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
x: P
C_x: C x
x_bottleneck: is_bottleneck x
y: P
y_comp: y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y
C_y: C y
leq_y_x: y ≤ x
y = x ⇒ f x ≤ f y
 intro e_yx; destruct e_yx; apply isrefl_posetRelation.
    
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
x: P
C_x: C x
x_bottleneck: is_bottleneck x
is_chain_closed ((λ x0 : P, x0 ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ x0) ∩ C)
 
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
x: P
C_x: C x
x_bottleneck: is_bottleneck x
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C',
((λ x0 : P, x0 ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ x0) ∩ C) (pr1 y)
((λ x0 : P, x0 ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ x0) ∩ C) (P_CC C')
 
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp

 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
x: P
C_x: C x
x_bottleneck: is_bottleneck x
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C',
((λ x0 : P, x0 ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ x0) ∩ C) (pr1 y)
P_CC C' ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ P_CC C'

P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P

:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp

 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C

((λ x0 : P, x0 ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ x0) ∩ C) (pr1 y)
C (P_CC C')

 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P

C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C

⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A

H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
x: P
C_x: C x
x_bottleneck: is_bottleneck x
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C',
((λ x0 : P, x0 ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ x0) ∩ C) (pr1 y)
C'_passes_fx: ∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y
P_CC C' ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ P_CC C'
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
x: P
C_x: C x
x_bottleneck: is_bottleneck x
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C',
((λ x0 : P, x0 ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ x0) ∩ C) (pr1 y)
C'_notpasses_fx: neg (∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y)
P_CC C' ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ P_CC C'

((λ x0 : P, x0 ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ x0) ∩ C) (pr1 y)
C'_passes_fx: ∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y
P_CC C' ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ P_CC C'

P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P

hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp

 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
x: P
C_x: C x
x_bottleneck: is_bottleneck x
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C',
((λ x0 : P, x0 ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ x0) ∩ C) (pr1 y)
C'_passes_fx: ∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y
f x ≤ P_CC C'

        
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P

:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)

hsubtype P: hsubtype P

((λ x0 : P, x0 ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ x0) ∩ C) (pr1 y)
C'_passes_fx: ∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y
y: P
C'_y: C' y
leq_fx_y: f x ≤ y
f x ≤ P_CC C'

f: Progressive_map P

leq_fx_y: f x ≤ y

 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))

 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)

C'_notpasses_fx: neg (∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y)
P_CC C' ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ P_CC C'

H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
x: P
C_x: C x
x_bottleneck: is_bottleneck x
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C',
((λ x0 : P, x0 ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ x0) ∩ C) (pr1 y)
C'_notpasses_fx: neg (∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y)
isupperbound (pr1carrier C') x
 
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
x: P
C_x: C x
x_bottleneck: is_bottleneck x
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C',
((λ x0 : P, x0 ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ x0) ∩ C) (pr1 y)
C'_notpasses_fx: neg (∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y)
y: P
C'_y: C' y
pr1carrier C' (y,, C'_y) ≤ x

P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P

 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
x: P
C_x: C x
x_bottleneck: is_bottleneck x
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C',
((λ x0 : P, x0 ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ x0) ∩ C) (pr1 y)
C'_notpasses_fx: neg (∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y)
y: P
C'_y: C' y
?P ∨ pr1carrier C' (y,, C'_y) ≤ x

H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
x: P
C_x: C x
x_bottleneck: is_bottleneck x
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C',
((λ x0 : P, x0 ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ x0) ∩ C) (pr1 y)
C'_notpasses_fx: neg (∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y)
y: P
C'_y: C' y
¬ (f x ≤ pr1 (y,, C'_y))

f: Progressive_map P

 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))

C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C

is_f_closed (A ∩ C)

IH_C': ∏ y : C',
((λ x0 : P, x0 ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ x0) ∩ C) (pr1 y)
C'_notpasses_fx: neg (∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y)

C'_y: C' y
leq_fx_y: f x ≤ pr1 (y,, C'_y)

P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P

 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
x: P
C_x: C x
x_bottleneck: is_bottleneck x
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C',
((λ x0 : P, x0 ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ x0) ∩ C) (pr1 y)
C'_notpasses_fx: neg (∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y)
y: P
C'_y: C' y
leq_fx_y: f x ≤ pr1 (y,, C'_y)
C' y ∧ f x ≤ y

H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
is_chain (pr1carrier C)

P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P

 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
∏ x : P, C x ⇒ is_bottleneck x
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp

 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))

hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)

hsubtype P: hsubtype P

C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
all_C_bottleneck: ∏ x : P, C x ⇒ is_bottleneck x
is_chain (pr1carrier C)

f: Progressive_map P

hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp

C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
x: P
x_bottleneck: is_bottleneck x
C_x: C x
C (f x)

P: Poset

f: Progressive_map P

 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
x: P
x_bottleneck: is_bottleneck x
C_x: C x
C (f x)

P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P

:

:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp

 ∀ A : hsubtype P,

:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P

  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)

C_x: C x
y: P
C_y: C y
le_y_fx: y ≤ f x
f y ≤ f x ∨ y = f x

 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)

bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)

C_x: C x
y: P
C_y: C y

y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ f x ∨ y = f x

P: Poset

f: Progressive_map P

is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
y: P
x_bottleneck: is_bottleneck y
C_x, C_y: C y
le_y_fx: y ≤ f y
le_yx: y ≤ y
f y ≤ f y
 apply isrefl_posetRelation.
    
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
is_chain_closed (is_bottleneck ∩ C)

P: Poset

f: Progressive_map P

hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C', (is_bottleneck ∩ C) (pr1 y)
(is_bottleneck ∩ C) (P_CC C')

P: Poset

f: Progressive_map P

:

:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp

 ∀ A : hsubtype P,

:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P

C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C

is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P

C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)

H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C', (is_bottleneck ∩ C) (pr1 y)
x: P
C_x: C x
le_x_supC': x ≤ P_CC C'
f x ≤ P_CC C' ∨ x = P_CC C'

P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P

:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp

 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C', (is_bottleneck ∩ C) (pr1 y)
x: P
C_x: C x
le_x_supC': x ≤ P_CC C'
C'_passes_fx: ∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y
f x ≤ P_CC C' ∨ x = P_CC C'
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C', (is_bottleneck ∩ C) (pr1 y)
x: P
C_x: C x
le_x_supC': x ≤ P_CC C'
C'_notpasses_fx: neg (∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y)
f x ≤ P_CC C' ∨ x = P_CC C'

P: Poset

 ∀ A : hsubtype P,

:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P

is_f_closed (A ∩ C)

 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)

hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x

     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)

f x ≤ P_CC C' ∨ x = P_CC C'
 
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C', (is_bottleneck ∩ C) (pr1 y)
x: P
C_x: C x
le_x_supC': x ≤ P_CC C'
C'_passes_fx: ∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y
f x ≤ P_CC C'

        
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (Preamble.pr1 y))
 ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C', (is_bottleneck ∩ C) (Preamble.pr1 y)
x: P
C_x: C x
le_x_supC': x ≤ P_CC C'
C'_passes_fx: ∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y
y: P
pr1: C' y
pr2: f x ≤ y
f x ≤ P_CC C'

        eapply istrans_posetRelation;
          eauto using least_upper_bound_subtype_is_upper_bound.
      
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C', (is_bottleneck ∩ C) (pr1 y)
x: P
C_x: C x
le_x_supC': x ≤ P_CC C'
C'_notpasses_fx: neg (∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y)
f x ≤ P_CC C' ∨ x = P_CC C'

      
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C', (is_bottleneck ∩ C) (pr1 y)
x: P
C_x: C x
le_x_supC': x ≤ P_CC C'
C'_notpasses_fx: neg (∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y)
x = P_CC C'

      
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C', (is_bottleneck ∩ C) (pr1 y)
x: P
C_x: C x
le_x_supC': x ≤ P_CC C'
C'_notpasses_fx: neg (∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y)
P_CC C' ≤ x

      
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C', (is_bottleneck ∩ C) (pr1 y)
x: P
C_x: C x
le_x_supC': x ≤ P_CC C'
C'_notpasses_fx: neg (∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y)
∏ y : P, C' y → y ≤ x
 
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C', (is_bottleneck ∩ C) (pr1 y)
x: P
C_x: C x
le_x_supC': x ≤ P_CC C'
C'_notpasses_fx: neg (∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y)
y: P
C'_y: C' y
y ≤ x

      
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C', (is_bottleneck ∩ C) (pr1 y)
x: P
C_x: C x
le_x_supC': x ≤ P_CC C'
C'_notpasses_fx: neg (∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y)
y: P
C'_y: C' y
y_bottleneck: is_bottleneck (pr1 (y,, C'_y))
C_y: C (pr1 (y,, C'_y))
y ≤ x

C x

     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)

 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))

     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)

P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C', (is_bottleneck ∩ C) (pr1 y)
x: P
C_x: C x
le_x_supC': x ≤ P_CC C'
C'_notpasses_fx: neg (∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y)
y: P
C'_y: C' y
y_bottleneck: is_bottleneck (pr1 (y,, C'_y))
C_y: C (pr1 (y,, C'_y))
X: f y ≤ x
y ≤ f y

           use progressive_property. 
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C', (is_bottleneck ∩ C) (pr1 y)
x: P
C_x: C x
le_x_supC': x ≤ P_CC C'
C'_notpasses_fx: neg (∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y)
y: P
C'_y: C' y
y_bottleneck: is_bottleneck (pr1 (y,, C'_y))
C_y: C (pr1 (y,, C'_y))
x ≤ y ⇒ y ≤ x

P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C', (is_bottleneck ∩ C) (pr1 y)
x: P
C_x: C x
le_x_supC': x ≤ P_CC C'
C'_notpasses_fx: neg (∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y)
y: P
C'_y: C' y
y_bottleneck: is_bottleneck (pr1 (y,, C'_y))
C_y: C (pr1 (y,, C'_y))
le_x_y: x ≤ y
y ≤ x
 
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C', (is_bottleneck ∩ C) (pr1 y)
x: P
C_x: C x
le_x_supC': x ≤ P_CC C'
C'_notpasses_fx: neg (∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y)
y: P
C'_y: C' y
y_bottleneck: is_bottleneck (pr1 (y,, C'_y))
C_y: C (pr1 (y,, C'_y))
le_x_y: x ≤ y
(x = y)%type

      
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
C': Chain_hsubtype P
IH_C': ∏ y : C', (is_bottleneck ∩ C) (pr1 y)
x: P
C_x: C x
le_x_supC': x ≤ P_CC C'
C'_notpasses_fx: neg (∃ y : P, C' y ∧ f x ≤ y)
y: P
C'_y: C' y
y_bottleneck: is_bottleneck (pr1 (y,, C'_y))
C_y: C (pr1 (y,, C'_y))
le_x_y: x ≤ y
¬ (f x ≤ pr1 (y,, C'_y))

        use (negexists_to_forallneg_restricted C'_notpasses_fx); assumption.
  
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
all_C_bottleneck: ∏ x : P, C x ⇒ is_bottleneck x
is_chain (pr1carrier C)

  
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
all_C_bottleneck: ∏ x : P, C x ⇒ is_bottleneck x
x: P
Cx: C x
y: P
Cy: C y
comparable x y

  
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
all_C_bottleneck: ∏ x : P, C x ⇒ is_bottleneck x
x: P
Cx: C x
y: P
Cy: C y
x ≤ y ∨ f y ≤ x
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
all_C_bottleneck: ∏ x : P, C x ⇒ is_bottleneck x
x: P
Cx: C x
y: P
Cy: C y
comparison: x ≤ y ∨ f y ≤ x
comparable x y

  
H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P

 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))

hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C

is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
all_C_bottleneck: ∏ x : P, C x ⇒ is_bottleneck x
x: P
Cx: C x
y: P
Cy: C y
x ≤ y ∨ f y ≤ x
 use bottleneck_comparison; try apply all_C_bottleneck; assumption.

H_LEM: LEM
P: Poset
P_CC: is_chain_complete P
f: Progressive_map P
is_f_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P, ∀ y : P, A y ⇒ A (f y))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
is_chain_closed:= (λ A : hsubtype P,
 ∀ C' : Chain_hsubtype P,
 (∏ y : C', A (pr1 y)) ⇒ A (P_CC C'))
:
hsubtype P → hProp: hsubtype P → hProp
C:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ A : hsubtype P,
 is_f_closed A ⇒ is_chain_closed A ⇒ A x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
C_f_closed: is_f_closed C
C_chain_closed: is_chain_closed C
C_induction: ∀ A : hsubtype P,
is_f_closed (A ∩ C)
⇒ is_chain_closed (A ∩ C) ⇒ C ⊆ A
is_bottleneck:= (λ x : P,
 ∀ y : P, C y ⇒ y ≤ x ⇒ f y ≤ x ∨ y = x)
:
hsubtype P: hsubtype P
bottleneck_comparison: ∀ x : P,
C x
⇒ is_bottleneck x
  ⇒ (∀ y : P,
     C y ⇒ y ≤ x ∨ f x ≤ y)
all_C_bottleneck: ∏ x : P, C x ⇒ is_bottleneck x
x: P
Cx: C x
y: P
Cy: C y
comparison: x ≤ y ∨ f y ≤ x
X: f y ≤ x
y ≤ f y

  use progressive_property.
Defined.

(** “Pataraia’s Lemma”: on any DCPO, there is a maximal monotone+progressive endo-map.
 This is the main lemma for Pataraia’s theorem, [fixpoint_for_monotone_on_dcpo]. *)

P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
greatest_suchthat
  (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
   isaposetmorphism_hProp f ∧ isprogressive f)


P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
greatest_suchthat
  (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
   isaposetmorphism_hProp f ∧ isprogressive f)

  (* Outline:
  The monotone progressive maps form a directed set, so have a pointwise sup.
  Also, they are closed under (inhabited) sups.
  So their sup is a maximal such map.
  The proof follows this outline, but reasoning bottom-up/backwards. *)
  
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
greatest_suchthat
  (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
   isaposetmorphism_hProp f ∧ isprogressive f)

  
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
is_greatest_suchthat mon_prog_maps
→ greatest_suchthat
    (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
     isaposetmorphism_hProp f ∧ isprogressive f)
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
is_greatest_suchthat mon_prog_maps

  
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
is_greatest_suchthat mon_prog_maps
→ greatest_suchthat
    (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
     isaposetmorphism_hProp f ∧ isprogressive f)
 
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
f: is_greatest_suchthat mon_prog_maps
greatest_suchthat
  (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
   isaposetmorphism_hProp f ∧ isprogressive f)
 exact (make_greatest_suchthat (pr1 f) (pr2 f)). 
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
is_greatest_suchthat mon_prog_maps

  
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
mon_prog_maps
∩ is_least_upper_bound_subtype mon_prog_maps
→ is_greatest_suchthat mon_prog_maps
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
mon_prog_maps
∩ is_least_upper_bound_subtype mon_prog_maps

  
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
mon_prog_maps
∩ is_least_upper_bound_subtype mon_prog_maps
→ is_greatest_suchthat mon_prog_maps
 
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
mon_prog_maps
∩ is_least_upper_bound_subtype mon_prog_maps
⊆ is_greatest_suchthat mon_prog_maps

    
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
x: arrow_Poset P P
pr1: mon_prog_maps x
pr2: is_least_upper_bound_subtype mon_prog_maps x
is_greatest_suchthat mon_prog_maps x
 apply greatest_if_contains_sup; assumption. 
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
mon_prog_maps
∩ is_least_upper_bound_subtype mon_prog_maps

  
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
is_least_upper_bound_pointwise
  (pr1carrier mon_prog_maps)
→ mon_prog_maps
  ∩ is_least_upper_bound_subtype mon_prog_maps
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
is_least_upper_bound_pointwise
  (pr1carrier mon_prog_maps)

  
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
is_least_upper_bound_pointwise
  (pr1carrier mon_prog_maps)
→ mon_prog_maps
  ∩ is_least_upper_bound_subtype mon_prog_maps
 
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
is_least_upper_bound_pointwise
  (pr1carrier mon_prog_maps)
⊆ mon_prog_maps
  ∩ is_least_upper_bound_subtype mon_prog_maps

    
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
f: forall_Poset (λ _ : P, P)
f_pw_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise
  (pr1carrier mon_prog_maps) f
isaposetmorphism_hProp f
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
f: forall_Poset (λ _ : P, P)
f_pw_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise
  (pr1carrier mon_prog_maps) f
isprogressive f

P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
f: forall_Poset (λ _ : P, P)
f_pw_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise
  (pr1carrier mon_prog_maps) f
is_least_upper_bound_subtype mon_prog_maps f

    
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
f: forall_Poset (λ _ : P, P)
f_pw_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise
  (pr1carrier mon_prog_maps) f
isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
f: forall_Poset (λ _ : P, P)
f_pw_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise
  (pr1carrier mon_prog_maps) f
∏ i : mon_prog_maps,
isaposetmorphism (pr1carrier mon_prog_maps i)

      intros [g [g_mon g_prog]]; exact g_mon.

 ∧ isprogressive f)
:

P_DC: is_directed_complete P

 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)

  (pr1carrier mon_prog_maps) f
∥ mon_prog_maps ∥

      
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
f: forall_Poset (λ _ : P, P)
f_pw_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise
  (pr1carrier mon_prog_maps) f
∏ i : mon_prog_maps,
isprogressive (pr1carrier mon_prog_maps i)
 intros [g [g_mon g_prog]]; exact g_prog. 
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
f: forall_Poset (λ _ : P, P)
f_pw_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise
  (pr1carrier mon_prog_maps) f
∥ mon_prog_maps ∥

:

f: forall_Poset (λ _ : P, P)
f_pw_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise
  (pr1carrier mon_prog_maps) f
mon_prog_maps

:

:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
f: forall_Poset (λ _ : P, P)
f_pw_lub: is_least_upper_bound_pointwise
  (pr1carrier mon_prog_maps) f
is_least_upper_bound_subtype mon_prog_maps f
 apply is_least_upper_bound_if_pointwise; assumption.
  
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
is_least_upper_bound_pointwise
  (pr1carrier mon_prog_maps)

  (* TODO: perhaps factor the following as “a directed set of functions has a pointwise l.u.b.”? *)
  
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
∏ x : P,
∑ p : (λ _ : P, P) x,
(λ (x0 : P) (y : (λ _ : P, P) x0),
 is_least_upper_bound
   (λ i : mon_prog_maps, pr1carrier mon_prog_maps i x0)
   y) x p

  
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
x: P
∑ p : (λ _ : P, P) x,
(λ (x : P) (y : (λ _ : P, P) x),
 is_least_upper_bound
   (λ i : mon_prog_maps, pr1carrier mon_prog_maps i x)
   y) x p

  
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
x: P
least_upper_bound (λ g : mon_prog_maps, pr1 g x)
→ ∑ p : (λ _ : P, P) x,
  (λ (x : P) (y : (λ _ : P, P) x),
   is_least_upper_bound
     (λ i : mon_prog_maps,
      pr1carrier mon_prog_maps i x) y) x p

x: P
least_upper_bound (λ g : mon_prog_maps, pr1 g x)

 isaposetmorphism_hProp f

:

x: P
least_upper_bound (λ g : mon_prog_maps, pr1 g x)
→ ∑ p : (λ _ : P, P) x,
  (λ (x : P) (y : (λ _ : P, P) x),

:

x: P
p: least_upper_bound (λ g : mon_prog_maps, pr1 g x)
∑ p : (λ _ : P, P) x,
(λ (x : P) (y : (λ _ : P, P) x),
 is_least_upper_bound
   (λ i : mon_prog_maps, pr1carrier mon_prog_maps i x)
   y) x p
 
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
x: P
p: least_upper_bound (λ g : mon_prog_maps, pr1 g x)
is_least_upper_bound
  (λ i : mon_prog_maps, pr1carrier mon_prog_maps i x)
  p
 apply least_upper_bound_property.

x: P

pr1 i x ≤ pr1 k x × pr1 j x ≤ pr1 k x

P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
x: P
f: arrow_Poset P P
f_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp f
f_prog: isprogressive f
g: arrow_Poset P P
g_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp g
g_prog: isprogressive g
∃ k : mon_prog_maps,
pr1 (f,, f_mon,, f_prog) x ≤ pr1 k x
× pr1 (g,, g_mon,, g_prog) x ≤ pr1 k x

P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
x: P
f: arrow_Poset P P
f_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp f
f_prog: isprogressive f
g: arrow_Poset P P
g_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp g
g_prog: isprogressive g
∑ k : mon_prog_maps,
pr1 (f,, f_mon,, f_prog) x ≤ pr1 k x
× pr1 (g,, g_mon,, g_prog) x ≤ pr1 k x

mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
x: P
f: arrow_Poset P P
f_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp f
f_prog: isprogressive f
g: arrow_Poset P P
g_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp g
g_prog: isprogressive g
mon_prog_maps
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
x: P
f: arrow_Poset P P
f_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp f
f_prog: isprogressive f
g: arrow_Poset P P
g_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp g
g_prog: isprogressive g
(λ k : mon_prog_maps,
 pr1 (f,, f_mon,, f_prog) x ≤ pr1 k x
 × pr1 (g,, g_mon,, g_prog) x ≤ pr1 k x) 
  ?pr1

 ∧ isprogressive f)
:

x: P

g_prog: isprogressive g

 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:

x: P
f: arrow_Poset P P

f_prog: isprogressive f

P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
x: P
f: arrow_Poset P P
f_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp f
f_prog: isprogressive f
g: arrow_Poset P P
g_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp g
g_prog: isprogressive g
isprogressive (f ∘ g)

      
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
x: P
f: arrow_Poset P P
f_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp f
f_prog: isprogressive f
g: arrow_Poset P P
g_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp g
g_prog: isprogressive g
isaposetmorphism_hProp (f ∘ g)
 apply isaposetmorphism_compose; assumption.
      
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
x: P
f: arrow_Poset P P
f_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp f
f_prog: isprogressive f
g: arrow_Poset P P
g_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp g
g_prog: isprogressive g
isprogressive (f ∘ g)
 apply isprogressive_compose; assumption.
    
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
x: P
f: arrow_Poset P P
f_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp f
f_prog: isprogressive f
g: arrow_Poset P P
g_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp g
g_prog: isprogressive g
(λ k : mon_prog_maps,
 pr1 (f,, f_mon,, f_prog) x ≤ pr1 k x
 × pr1 (g,, g_mon,, g_prog) x ≤ pr1 k x)
  (f ∘ g,,
   isaposetmorphism_compose g_mon f_mon,,
   isprogressive_compose f_prog g_prog)

    
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
x: P
f: arrow_Poset P P
f_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp f
f_prog: isprogressive f
g: arrow_Poset P P
g_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp g
g_prog: isprogressive g
f x ≤ f (g x)
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
x: P
f: arrow_Poset P P
f_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp f
f_prog: isprogressive f
g: arrow_Poset P P
g_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp g
g_prog: isprogressive g
g x ≤ f (g x)

    
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
x: P
f: arrow_Poset P P
f_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp f
f_prog: isprogressive f
g: arrow_Poset P P
g_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp g
g_prog: isprogressive g
f x ≤ f (g x)
 use f_mon; use g_prog.
    
P: Poset
P_DC: is_directed_complete P
mon_prog_maps:= (λ f : arrow_Poset P P,
 isaposetmorphism_hProp f
 ∧ isprogressive f)
:
hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P): hsubtype (arrow_Poset P P)
x: P
f: arrow_Poset P P
f_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp f
f_prog: isprogressive f
g: arrow_Poset P P
g_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp g
g_prog: isprogressive g
g x ≤ f (g x)
 use f_prog.
Defined.

(** A constructive fixed-point theorem, due to Pataraia.
  This proof transmitted via Dacar and Bauer–Lumsdaine (where it is Thm 3.2). *)

P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x: Postfixedpoint f
∑ y : Fixedpoint f, x ≤ y


P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
x: Postfixedpoint f
∑ y : Fixedpoint f, x ≤ y

  (* Outline:
  - restrict attention to the sub-poset of post-fixed-points of P
  - by Pataraia’s Lemma [maximal_progressive_endomorphism_on_dcpo], there is a maximal monotone progressive map on this sub-poset
  - note that values of this maximal map are fixed points of f
  *)
  
P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
∏ x : Postfixedpoint f, ∑ y : Fixedpoint f, x ≤ y

  
P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
postfix_f:= (λ x : P, x ≤ f x) : Subposet P: Subposet P
∏ x : Postfixedpoint f, ∑ y : Fixedpoint f, x ≤ y

  
P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
postfix_f:= (λ x : P, x ≤ f x) : Subposet P: Subposet P
is_directed_complete postfix_f
P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
postfix_f:= (λ x : P, x ≤ f x) : Subposet P: Subposet P
postfix_dc: is_directed_complete postfix_f
∏ x : Postfixedpoint f, ∑ y : Fixedpoint f, x ≤ y

  
P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
postfix_f:= (λ x : P, x ≤ f x) : Subposet P: Subposet P
is_directed_complete postfix_f
 
P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
postfix_f:= (λ x : P, x ≤ f x) : Subposet P: Subposet P
A: hsubtype postfix_f
A_dir: isdirected (pr1carrier A)
least_upper_bound (A,, A_dir)

    
P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
postfix_f:= (λ x : P, x ≤ f x) : Subposet P: Subposet P
A: hsubtype postfix_f
A_dir: isdirected (pr1carrier A)
least_upper_bound (pr1 ∘ (A,, A_dir))
P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
postfix_f:= (λ x : P, x ≤ f x) : Subposet P: Subposet P
A: hsubtype postfix_f
A_dir: isdirected (pr1carrier A)
postfix_f ?x

    
P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
postfix_f:= (λ x : P, x ≤ f x) : Subposet P: Subposet P
A: hsubtype postfix_f
A_dir: isdirected (pr1carrier A)
least_upper_bound (pr1 ∘ (A,, A_dir))
 
P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
postfix_f:= (λ x : P, x ≤ f x) : Subposet P: Subposet P
A: hsubtype postfix_f
A_dir: isdirected (pr1carrier A)
isdirected (pr1 ∘ (A,, A_dir))
 assumption. 
P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
postfix_f:= (λ x : P, x ≤ f x) : Subposet P: Subposet P
A: hsubtype postfix_f
A_dir: isdirected (pr1carrier A)
postfix_f
  (isdirected_lub P_dir (pr1 ∘ (A,, A_dir)) A_dir)

    (* Uncannily, [A_dir] works off the bat, without needing to be converted from
    directedness in Q to directedness in P!
    It’s clear that these types are convertible, but impressive that Coq recognises it so easily. *)
    
P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
postfix_f:= (λ x : P, x ≤ f x) : Subposet P: Subposet P
A: hsubtype postfix_f
A_dir: isdirected (pr1carrier A)
isupperbound (pr1 ∘ (A,, A_dir))
  (f (isdirected_lub P_dir (pr1 ∘ (A,, A_dir)) A_dir))
 
P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
postfix_f:= (λ x : P, x ≤ f x) : Subposet P: Subposet P
A: hsubtype postfix_f
A_dir: isdirected (pr1carrier A)
x: P
x_postfix: postfix_f x
x_A: (A,, A_dir) (x,, x_postfix)
(pr1 ∘ (A,, A_dir)) ((x,, x_postfix),, x_A)
≤ f (isdirected_lub P_dir (pr1 ∘ (A,, A_dir)) A_dir)

    
P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
postfix_f:= (λ x : P, x ≤ f x) : Subposet P: Subposet P
A: hsubtype postfix_f
A_dir: isdirected (pr1carrier A)
x: P
x_postfix: postfix_f x
x_A: (A,, A_dir) (x,, x_postfix)
(pr1 ∘ (A,, A_dir)) ((x,, x_postfix),, x_A) ≤ ?x2
P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
postfix_f:= (λ x : P, x ≤ f x) : Subposet P: Subposet P
A: hsubtype postfix_f
A_dir: isdirected (pr1carrier A)
x: P
x_postfix: postfix_f x
x_A: (A,, A_dir) (x,, x_postfix)
?x2
≤ f (isdirected_lub P_dir (pr1 ∘ (A,, A_dir)) A_dir)
 
P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
postfix_f:= (λ x : P, x ≤ f x) : Subposet P: Subposet P
A: hsubtype postfix_f
A_dir: isdirected (pr1carrier A)
x: P
x_postfix: postfix_f x
x_A: (A,, A_dir) (x,, x_postfix)
(pr1 ∘ (A,, A_dir)) ((x,, x_postfix),, x_A) ≤ ?x2
 apply x_postfix.

x_A: (A,, A_dir) (x,, x_postfix)
f x
≤ f (isdirected_lub P_dir (pr1 ∘ (A,, A_dir)) A_dir)

    simple refine (value_in_image _ ((_,,_),,_)); assumption.

∏ x : Postfixedpoint f, ∑ y : Fixedpoint f, x ≤ y

f: posetmorphism P P

postfix_dc: is_directed_complete postfix_f
max_monprog_map:= maximal_progressive_endomorphism_on_dcpo
  postfix_dc: greatest_suchthat
  (λ f : arrow_Poset postfix_f

P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
postfix_f:= (λ x : P, x ≤ f x) : Subposet P: Subposet P
postfix_dc: is_directed_complete postfix_f
max_map: arrow_Poset postfix_f postfix_f
max_is_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp max_map
max_is_prog: isprogressive max_map
max_is_max: isupperbound pr1
  (pr1
     (max_map,, max_is_mon,, max_is_prog))
∏ x : Postfixedpoint f, ∑ y : Fixedpoint f, x ≤ y

P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P

postfix_dc: is_directed_complete postfix_f

  (pr1
     (max_map,, max_is_mon,, max_is_prog))
f_restr_postfix:= (λ x : postfix_f,
 f (pr1 x),,
 posetmorphism_property f 
   (pr1 x) (f (pr1 x))
   (postfixedpoint_property x))
:

∏ x : Postfixedpoint f, ∑ y : Fixedpoint f, x ≤ y

P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P

postfix_dc: is_directed_complete postfix_f
max_map: arrow_Poset postfix_f postfix_f
max_is_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp max_map
max_is_prog: isprogressive max_map
max_is_max: isupperbound pr1
  (pr1
     (max_map,, max_is_mon,, max_is_prog))
f_restr_postfix:= (λ x : postfix_f,
 f (pr1 x),,
 posetmorphism_property f 
   (pr1 x) (f (pr1 x))
   (postfixedpoint_property x))
:
arrow_Poset postfix_f postfix_f: arrow_Poset postfix_f postfix_f
max_map_gives_fixedpoints: f_restr_postfix ∘ max_map ~
max_map
∏ x : Postfixedpoint f, ∑ y : Fixedpoint f, x ≤ y

  
P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
postfix_f:= (λ x : P, x ≤ f x) : Subposet P: Subposet P
postfix_dc: is_directed_complete postfix_f
max_map: arrow_Poset postfix_f postfix_f
max_is_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp max_map
max_is_prog: isprogressive max_map
max_is_max: isupperbound pr1
  (pr1
     (max_map,, max_is_mon,, max_is_prog))
f_restr_postfix:= (λ x : postfix_f,
 f (pr1 x),,
 posetmorphism_property f 
   (pr1 x) (f (pr1 x))
   (postfixedpoint_property x))
:
arrow_Poset postfix_f postfix_f: arrow_Poset postfix_f postfix_f
max_map_gives_fixedpoints: f_restr_postfix ∘ max_map ~
max_map
x: Postfixedpoint f
∑ y : Fixedpoint f, x ≤ y
 
P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
postfix_f:= (λ x : P, x ≤ f x) : Subposet P: Subposet P
postfix_dc: is_directed_complete postfix_f
max_map: arrow_Poset postfix_f postfix_f

max_is_max: isupperbound pr1
  (pr1
     (max_map,, max_is_mon,, max_is_prog))
f_restr_postfix:= (λ x : postfix_f,
 f (pr1 x),,
 posetmorphism_property f 
   (pr1 x) (f (pr1 x))
   (postfixedpoint_property x))
:
arrow_Poset postfix_f postfix_f: arrow_Poset postfix_f postfix_f
max_map_gives_fixedpoints: f_restr_postfix ∘ max_map ~
max_map
x: Postfixedpoint f
(f (pr1 (max_map x)) = pr1 (max_map x))%type
P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
postfix_f:= (λ x : P, x ≤ f x) : Subposet P: Subposet P
postfix_dc: is_directed_complete postfix_f
max_map: arrow_Poset postfix_f postfix_f
max_is_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp max_map
max_is_prog: isprogressive max_map
max_is_max: isupperbound pr1
  (pr1
     (max_map,, max_is_mon,, max_is_prog))
f_restr_postfix:= (λ x : postfix_f,
 f (pr1 x),,
 posetmorphism_property f 
   (pr1 x) (f (pr1 x))
   (postfixedpoint_property x))
:
arrow_Poset postfix_f postfix_f: arrow_Poset postfix_f postfix_f
max_map_gives_fixedpoints: f_restr_postfix ∘ max_map ~
max_map
x: Postfixedpoint f
x ≤ pr1 (max_map x)

  
P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
postfix_f:= (λ x : P, x ≤ f x) : Subposet P: Subposet P
postfix_dc: is_directed_complete postfix_f
max_map: arrow_Poset postfix_f postfix_f
max_is_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp max_map
max_is_prog: isprogressive max_map
max_is_max: isupperbound pr1
  (pr1
     (max_map,, max_is_mon,, max_is_prog))
f_restr_postfix:= (λ x : postfix_f,
 f (pr1 x),,
 posetmorphism_property f 
   (pr1 x) (f (pr1 x))
   (postfixedpoint_property x))
:
arrow_Poset postfix_f postfix_f: arrow_Poset postfix_f postfix_f
max_map_gives_fixedpoints: f_restr_postfix ∘ max_map ~
max_map
x: Postfixedpoint f
(f (pr1 (max_map x)) = pr1 (max_map x))%type
 exact (maponpaths _ (max_map_gives_fixedpoints x)).
  
P: Poset
P_dir: is_directed_complete P
f: posetmorphism P P
postfix_f:= (λ x : P, x ≤ f x) : Subposet P: Subposet P
postfix_dc: is_directed_complete postfix_f
max_map: arrow_Poset postfix_f postfix_f
max_is_mon: isaposetmorphism_hProp max_map
max_is_prog: isprogressive max_map
max_is_max: isupperbound pr1
  (pr1
     (max_map,, max_is_mon,, max_is_prog))
f_restr_postfix:= (λ x : postfix_f,
 f (pr1 x),,
 posetmorphism_property f 
   (pr1 x) (f (pr1 x))
   (postfixedpoint_property x))
:
arrow_Poset postfix_f postfix_f: arrow_Poset postfix_f postfix_f
max_map_gives_fixedpoints: f_restr_postfix ∘ max_map ~
max_map
x: Postfixedpoint f
x ≤ pr1 (max_map x)
 use max_is_prog.
Defined.

End Bourbaki_Witt.


(** Finally, we check that the promises listed in the overview have been fulfilled.

  Note: we give these here to ensure that the overview always accurately reflects the theorems of the file.  However, we make them local, since they should probably not be used outside this file — the original versions proved above are the versions intended for use. *)
Section Check_Overview.

  
Tarski_fixpoint_theorem_statement is_complete
  (@isfixedpoint)

  
Tarski_fixpoint_theorem_statement is_complete
  (@isfixedpoint)

    use @Tarski_fixpoint_theorem.
  Defined.

  
fixpoint_for_monotone_on_dcpo_statement
  is_directed_complete (@ispostfixedpoint)
  (@isfixedpoint)

  
fixpoint_for_monotone_on_dcpo_statement
  is_directed_complete (@ispostfixedpoint)
  (@isfixedpoint)

    use @fixpoint_for_monotone_on_dcpo.
  Defined.

  (** Classical theorem, usually attrbi. Bourbaki (1949) and Witt (1951). *)
  
Bourbaki_Witt_fixpoint_theorem_statement
  is_chain_complete (@isprogressive) (@isfixedpoint)

  
Bourbaki_Witt_fixpoint_theorem_statement
  is_chain_complete (@isprogressive) (@isfixedpoint)

    use @Bourbaki_Witt_fixpoint.
  Defined.

End Check_Overview.
